name: asg.ruined1
children: * Welcome to RUINED HOME, the former capital of monster civilization!
* There are still some puzzles lying about to be solved, and...
* Actually, why don't I just show you?

name: asg.ruined1_2
children: * ... It's funny. * Sometimes I forget how small RUINED HOME is!
* Well, I guess that's what comes with old age, eh?

name: asg.ruined2
children: * So! Now that we're here...
* You may be wondering just why you need to solve puzzles to pass.
* Soon after the war, we set up these puzzles to deter human invaders.
* After a while, however, they stopped serving their original purpose...
* And became a part of our everyday lives!
* Nowadays, it's just tradition to solve puzzles to proceed.
* So, what do you say? * Let's give it a shot!

name: asg.ruined2_fail
children: * Ho ho ho! * Unfortunately, that was not the correct solution.
* Here, I shall show you.
* Now, I understand if this puzzle may have been confusing.
* However, as your obstacles shall grow greater...
* ... you will need to be prepared for them.
* This... includes reading the signs.
* How else would you know what to do?
* In any case, let us continue to the next room.
* No worries, though! * We still have time for that.
* I would recommend reading more signs in the future.
* You shouldn't miss out on vital information!
* In any case, let us continue to the next room.

name: asg.ruined2_int
children:
* What's wrong, little one? 
* Do you need help?
* Well, perhaps I could give you a slight hint.
* "In order to find the truth, you must first identify the lies."
* "Only then will you discover the solution."
* Golly, I sure hope that helped!

name: asg.ruined2_success
children: * Wonderful! * I am proud of you, young one.
* However, this was but a simple test.
* As we continue, the obstacles will become more difficult.
* Though... I'm curious. * You did this with such ease...
* Have you done this before...?
* In any case, let us continue to the next room.
* Though, I'm certain you have the hang of it.
* You certainly seem to know what you're doing.
* Have you done something similar before?
* In any case, let us continue to the next room.

name: asg.ruined3
children: * Now, on to something much easier!
* To complete this puzzle, you must navigate the two mazes.
* Just flip the right switches to lower the barriers.
* Flipping the incorrect switch will result in a penalty, so beware!

name: asg.ruined3_dizzy
children: * Ho ho ho! * My, isn't this quite the game we're playing?
* I must ask you to slow down, however.
* I'm getting rather dizzy!

name: asg.ruined3_dizzy2
children: * G-golly, I'm quite d-dizzy!
* Human, as much as I enjoy spinning around with you...
* I'm afraid we'll have to stop for now.
* Perhaps we could play this again later?

name: asg.ruined3_fail
children: * Ho ho ho!
* No, human, I'm afraid that switch was not meant to be pressed.
* Therefore, you must face a penalty!
* The penalty of time, which all creatures must face.
* Now go flip the correct switch.

name: asg.ruined3_int
children: * The spikes are made of rubber, so don't be scared!
* This puzzle is simple enough.
* Just refer to the signs and your wits!

name: asg.ruined3_int2
children: * Come on, young one! * You can do it!

name: asg.ruined3_int3
children: * Great! * Just one more switch to go, little one!

name: asg.ruined3_reflip
children: * Golly!
* I never knew that humans found such joy in flipping switches!
* Perhaps I should build a "switch dungeon" in my home?
* Oh, what fun that could be for you, human!

name: asg.ruined3_reflip2
children: * I know that you're having fun, child, but we have more to do!
* Once you're ready, please flip the correct switch.

name: asg.ruined3_success
children: * Excellent work!
* You certainly have a grasp as to how puzzles work here.
* Unfortunately, there are obstacles far more difficult ahead.
* I will explain in the next room.

name: asg.ruined4
children: * Ah, here we are!
* Through this door is a very old training room.
* As you are a human in the UNDERGROUND, monsters may attack you.
* Now, don't get the wrong idea!
* Many monsters are still... very bitter with humanity.
* Either way, you must know how to defend yourself.
Yes
No
* Splendid! * Come along, then.

name: asg.ruined4_2
children: * When a monster attacks, you will enter a FIGHT.
* In this scenario, your opponent shall be this training dummy!
* When you're ready to begin, simply approach it.

name: asg.ruined4_int
children: * There's nothing to be afraid of!
* The dummy won't be bothered by anything.
* ... probably.

name: asg.ruined4_int2
children: * Oh, dear. * Are you nervous, young one?
* There, there. * This will only take a moment.
* Think of it as... a trip to the dentist!
* Yes, it may be intimidating. But it's quite necessary.

name: asg.ruined4_int3
children: * Erhm... I gather my metaphor didn't help much...

name: asg.ruined4_post
children: * Before we move on, I want to give you something.
* JOURNAL was added to KEY ITEMS.
* This is a JOURNAL. * And some crayons, too!
* With these, you may jot down whatever you see fit.
* Whether it be profiles, notes, or doodles...
* I'm sure you will use it very well.
* In the meantime, I will be going on ahead.
* Feel free to record your thoughts, or take a break!
* This room is rather tranquil, after all.
* The perfect place for a picnic, or a tea party...
* ... Bah, there I go rambling again.
* Regardless, human, take your time.
* In any case... * That's it for battle training, I suppose.

name: asg.ruined5
children: * Ho ho ho! * Well, would you look at that!
* It's none other than a bowl of candy!
* Say... why don't you treat yourself to a piece?
* After all, you've certainly earned it!

name: asg.ruined5_int
children: * Hm? What's the matter, young one?
* Do you not want a piece of candy...?
* I assure you, they are delicious!
* They taste nothing like licorice.
* Are you sure, young one?
* This is no normal candy! * It is a magic ITEM.
* One of many ITEMS that can heal SOUL damage from a FIGHT.

* I strongly urge you to reconsider... 
* Though only if you wish.

name: asg.ruined6_chat
children: * Ah... Would you smell the flowers?
* I know it may not seem like such a big deal.
* They're just flowers, after all.
* But, see... it's much more than that.
* Even though this world was meant to be our prison...
* Sealing us underneath the bright skies and singing birds...
* Life continues to firmly plant its roots. * And with it, hope.
* Hope for a better tomorrow. * For peace. For freedom.
* You know...
* It's times like this where I reminisce about the past.
* For instance, while thinking about flowers, and the surface...
* I can't help but think of my younger, more rambunctious days.
* My, the kind of trouble I would get myself into.
* We sure were a lot of troublemakers.
* Exploring the world, questioning life's many mysteries...
* Daring to go where no one else would.
* I recall a certain one of us being so determined...
* ... but that's all in the past.
* Not everything can last forever, young one.
* Ah... how I would love a cup of tea right now.
* The plant life here is so beautiful, so vibrant...
* So peaceful and relaxing.
* It's always so rewarding to appreciate nature.
* Why, my favorite tea brew comes from the local golden flowers!
* I like to call it "golden flower tea."
* I've... been told I'm not very creative when it comes to names...
* Although I feel that they are very simple, straight, and concise!
* Even if they DO lack in originality at times.
* Perhaps at some point, we could share a cup of tea together?
* Whether it's by the garden, or the hearth, or even the city...
* A good cup of tea is very calming.
* You may be wondering what other monsters are like.
* How they act, how they look...
* Well, I can assure you, none look like me.
* There are a wide variety of monsters in the UNDERGROUND.
* Spiders, skeletons, slimes, creepers... * And plants, even!
* Why, I could have sworn I even saw a golden flower monster once!
* I wonder how many there are...?
* Perhaps we could both make friends with them!
* Spiders, skeletons, slimes, stones... * And plants, even!
* Why, I could have sworn I even saw a golden flower monster once!
* I wonder how many there are...?
* Perhaps we could both make friends with them!
* You know, it's funny.
* Being the sage of RUINED HOME, and knowing so many monsters...
* You'd think that I'd recognize just about everyone here.
* I always ensure to take walks throughout the city...
* Saying hello to as many people as I can, and attending social events.
* But every now and then... it seems like unfamiliar faces appear.
* One of them, I could even swear resembled...
* ... No, that couldn't be. Just a coincidence.
* That was very, very long ago... maybe even from before my time!
* There's this friend of mine who lives beyond RUINED HOME.
* He's quite a jolly, lively fellow.
* Sometimes, I invite him inside, and we chat over tea.
* Whether it's just sharing clever riddles and puzzle ideas...
* Discussing everyday life, or maybe even the weather...
* Erm, lack thereof, at least...
* It's good to have such a nice friend.
* Somebody with such hope for the future. Such kindness and optimism.
* Somebody who, even when everything seems bleak...
* Manages to put such a smile on my face.
* Perhaps... I could introduce the two of you?
* When life is hard, it's always nice to have a friend.
* So much time has passed...
* That ill-fated day seems so, so long ago... yet so familiar.
* I've been trying my best to keep monsters hopeful. Happy.
* So even if we never get to see the surface again...
* At least we still have this place to call home.
* Our own little slice of freedom. Our own world.
* And... perhaps it could be yours, too?

name: asg.ruined6_end
children: * Golly, are we already at the end of the hall?
* It's quite amazing just how fast time can fly.
* Especially when you're as old as me, ho ho ho!
* Now that we've reached the end...
* You have been doing such a great job!
* Why, everything thus far has gone smoothly!
* ... w-well, aside from the dummy, but...
* I am confident that now, you understand the basics of RUINED HOME.
* Come! Let us return to my home. Perhaps you could help me
* (Ring, ring...)
* Now, who could that be?
* Howdy! How may I-
* Oh, golly! * T-that is quite unexpected!
* I'll be right there to sort it out.
* (Click...)
* My apologies! Something has suddenly come up.
* I must run some errands, which means you will be alone for a while.
* ... I know, I know.
* You HAVE proven your understanding of RUINED HOME.
* However, it seems somebody has been causing a ruckus...
* Harassing monsters and screaming rather loudly! And angrily.
* I do trust you, but I worry for your safety.
* ...Ah! It seems that I have an extra CELL PHONE. Please take it.
* CELL PHONE was added to KEY ITEMS. * It can be used from the MENU.
* In the event that you need me, feel free to call!
* I will return soon. * Please stay safe, young one.
* You have been doing quite well so far, young one.
* Though, please... remember to think before you act.
* We wouldn't want to hurt anyone...
* But... you have certainly proved your capabilities.
* I know you must still be rather frightened.
* B-but, erm... I know you don't mean to hurt anyone.
* Just... please, be more careful in the future.
* ...Regardless, I... suppose you have proved your capabilities.
* Come! Let us return to my home. Perhaps you could help me
* (Ring, ring...)
* Now, who could that be?
* Howdy! How may I-
* Oh, golly! * T-that is quite unexpected!
* I'll be right there to sort it out.
* (Click...)
* My apologies! Something has suddenly come up.
* I must run some errands, which means you will be alone for a while.
* ... I know, I know.
* You HAVE proven your understanding of RUINED HOME.
* However, it seems somebody has been causing a ruckus...
* Harassing monsters and screaming rather loudly! And angrily.
* I do trust you, but I worry for your safety.
* ...Ah! It seems that I have an extra CELL PHONE. Please take it.
* CELL PHONE was added to KEY ITEMS. * It can be used from the MENU.
* In the event that you need me, feel free to call!
* I will return soon. * Please stay safe, young one.

name: asg.ruined6_intro
children: * Now, then...
* Before we proceed throughout the rest of RUINED HOME...
* I thought we would just take a little stroll.
* Enjoy the scenery and chat for a while.
* Come, young one.

name: asg.tem_ending
children:
* Can you walk? 
* ... Ah, good. Come with me.

name: asg_home.gardennote
children: * The note reads: "Howdy! If I'm not around, I'm most likely in my garden."
* "If you need to get something off your chest, don't hesitate to come by."
"- ASGORE"

name: asg_home.gate_locked
children: * It's locked.

name: asg_home.house_locked
children: * Using the key, I unlock the door.
* It's locked. Needs a key.
* It's locked.

name: asg_home.house_locked_gf
children: * It's locked.

name: asg_home.inside
children: * Now, would you smell that?
* Surprise! To celebrate your arrival...
* I brewed a fresh pot of golden flower tea!
* There's even cinnamon sprinkled in, just for you.
* Now... you may be stuck here for some time.
* So if you need a place to stay...
* I have another surprise for you:
* A bedroom of your own!
* It's even stocked with toys and books! * How about that!
* I, erm... hope you don't mind all of this.
* I'd like you to be comfortable for as long as you're here.
* With that being said... I shall finish preparing the tea.
* Perhaps take a nap in the meantime? You surely deserve it.
* There's even a chunk of butterscotch on the side, just for you.
* Now... you may be stuck here for some time.
* So if you need a place to stay...
* I have another surprise for you:
* A bedroom of your own!
* It's even stocked with toys and books! * How about that!
* I, erm... hope you don't mind all of this.
* I'd like you to be comfortable for as long as you're here.
* With that being said... I shall finish preparing the tea.
* Perhaps take a nap in the meantime? You surely deserve it.

name: asg_home.inside_asleep
children: * (He's fast asleep.) * (Best to let him rest.)

name: asg_home.inside_postnap
children: * Why, hello there!
* Don't mind the change in clothes. * It's just to celebrate!
* I can imagine a good rest did some wonders for you, eh?
* And I'm sure that tea will, too!
* Don't worry, it won't grow cold any time soon.
* (Sigh...) It's such a pleasure to have you here, young one.
* I know that your journey thus far has been difficult...
* But now, you have nothing to worry about.
* There are so many things I want to share with you.
* Old stories and books, tea, gardening...
* My, we could even visit Grillby's for a treat, occasionally!
* I just... want you to be happy here.
* That being said...
* Is there anything you would like, right now?

Where is
the exit?
Nothing

Can I
stay here?
* Did you notice the cup of tea I left for you?
* Don't worry, it won't grow cold any time soon.
* (Sigh...) It's such a pleasure to have you here, young one.
* I know that your journey thus far has been difficult...
* But now, you have nothing to worry about.
* There are so many things I want to share with you.
* Old stories and books, tea, gardening...
* My, we could even visit Grillby's for a treat, occasionally!
* I just... want you to be happy here.

* Howdy! Is there anything you would like right now?

Where is

Nothing

Can I

name: asg_home.inside_postnap_finish
children: * Don't hesitate to tell me if you need anything.

name: asg_home.inside_prenap
children: * Hello, child! * The tea is currently cooling down.
* It may take a while, in which case...
* Perhaps you should take that nap?
Yes
No
* Splendid! I will ensure your tea isn't cold when you awake.

name: asg_home.int_asgroom.bed
children: * A bed fit for a fool.
* A bed fit for a king.

name: asg_home.int_asgroom.bureau
children: * Nothing interesting here.
* Scandalous...! * It's ASGORE's sock drawer!

name: asg_home.int_asgroom.chair
children: * This chair seems too small for ASGORE...

name: asg_home.int_asgroom.closet
children: * This closet is missing some robes.
* It's a closet filled with robes, sweaters, and a Santa Claus outfit.

name: asg_home.int_asgroom.flower
children: * Golden flower.
* It's yet another golden flower.

name: asg_home.int_asgroom.guitar
children: * It's a classical guitar.
* I guess ASGORE played it as a hobby.
* I guess ASGORE plays it as a hobby.
* It's a classical guitar. * It's... vibrating slightly?
* No, that can't be right.
* It's a classical guitar- * Okay, it's definitely shaking.
* And... mumbling?
* It's a classical guit-
* Don't you have anything better to do, you DUMMY!
* Insolent. Insolent! INSOLENT!!!
* Can't you see that I'm trying to STALK YOU?!
* Er, I mean...
* It's... a classical guitar. Yup.

name: asg_home.int_asgroom.journal
children: * It's completely stained with tears.
Yes
No
* I read the passage...
* "Another human has fallen down."
* "Today, of all days... could this be a sign...?"
* "My last chance to make up for my mistakes..."
* "I will not fail again."

name: asg_home.int_asgroom.trophy
children: * A small nightstand with a trophy on top.
* It reads "Number 1 Nose-Nuzzle Champs '98!"

name: asg_home.int_bathroom.bathtub
children: * There's fur in the drain. * Disgusting.
* (No, I shouldn't.) * (My skin has wrinkled enough from the sewer.)
* (There is such a thing as too many bubble baths.)
* (I am dangerously close to reaching that threshold.)
Yes
No
* (In that case...)
* (That was a very relaxing bubble bath!)
* (HP fully restored.)
* Is it a bathtub, or is it a shower?
* The world may never know.

name: asg_home.int_bathroom.flower
children: * Golden flower.
* It's yet another golden flower.

name: asg_home.int_bathroom.sink
children: * The mirror is too high to see my reflection.

name: asg_home.int_bathroom.soapshelf
children: * Seems like ASGORE enjoys taking bubble baths.

name: asg_home.int_bathroom.table
children: * ... Idiotic drivel.
* It's a set of instructions on how to use the toilet.
* (Step 1: Sit down.)
* (Step 2: Do your business.)
* (Step 3: Use complimentary toilet paper to your advantage.)
* (Step 4: Flush.)
* (Step 5: Do a victory dance while it flushes!)
* (- Sincerely, ASGORE)
* (P.S. Remember to remove your bottom apparel before sitting down!)

name: asg_home.int_bathroom.toilet
children: * Unnecessary.
Yes
No
* (I flush the toilet.)
* (It doesn't seem to be working.)

name: asg_home.int_bathroom.tp
children: * (This toilet paper seems newly restocked.)

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.bed
children: * It's a comfortable-looking bed.
Yes
No
* As I rest, my thoughts wander.
* Never before have I felt this way.
* This power... is this strength?
* I feel... unstoppable.
* But even still... his words ring through my mind.
* "Why?"
* I try to recall my reasons. * How this journey began.
* My mind escapes me, guilt flowing through my veins.
* And yet...
Yes
No
* I suppose I deserve some rest.
* The next day...
* I wake up to the smell of a butterscotch-cinnamon pie.
* ASGORE opens the door to my room, saying "Howdy!" as he brings me a slice.
* We spend the day sitting by the fire, telling stories...
* Eating pie...
* Almost like... like a family.
* It makes me hopeful that, perhaps...
* Life underground won't be so bad, after all.
* But as much as I want to stay here...
* I feel compelled to keep going.
* While I can't remember why... * The thought of the surface terrifies me.
* And yet...

* ... No time to sleep right now.
* I... really don't feel comfortable sleeping here.

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.box
children: * Boring toys.
* Wow, so many cool toys...! * I hope someone enjoys them.

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.closet
children: * Old clothes.
* This closet is filled with clothes for every occasion. * All with stripes, of course.

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.dresser
children: * Separated from the rest.
* Looks like someone's in time-out.

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.figures
children: * Cheap plastic distractions.

* A collection of action figures. 
* Brave heroes and dastardly villains, locked in combat.
* But who will be the victor in this battle?
* Stay tuned.

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.frog
children: * A Froggit plush.
* It's a Froggit. * . . .
* Plush. * Of course.

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.game
children: * Nothing of value here.
* It looks like an old video game console.
* ... but it's just a "brick game."
* "9999 games in one," huh?

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.nightstand
children: * Actually, now that I check the drawer...
* This nightstand is overflowing with comic books!
* Some look like they were drawn by a child.
* ... with their mouth??
* There's nothing noteworthy about this nightstand.
* There's nothing noteworthy about this nightstand.

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.tea
children: * This tea looks useful.
* ... I'll take this tea for later.
* ... I'm carrying too much to take this tea.
* It's still warm... * Smells like cinnamon, too...
* It's still warm... * And that butterscotch looks so tasty...

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.temmie
children: * It's dusty.
* It's a familiar-looking, dusty plush doll.
* I hope this one doesn't bite.

name: asg_home.int_bedroom.window
children: * A fake window.
* On second glance, it's just a glow in the dark decoration.
* Huh.
* Since when did it get so dark outside? * And... underground...?

name: asg_home.int_diningroom.frame
children: * A familiar-looking landscape portrait.

name: asg_home.int_diningroom.table
children: * It's a dining table with chairs for three.

name: asg_home.int_foyer.bookshelf
children: * These books... * I can't waste time reading them.
* These books are so worn...
* Seems like ASGORE enjoys a good read.

name: asg_home.int_foyer.calendar
children: * An old calendar.
* It's an old calendar from 201X.
* Oddly enough... today's date is circled.

name: asg_home.int_foyer.coatrack
children: * Tattered rags.
* These tattered scarves have seen better days.

name: asg_home.int_hallway.bookshelf
children: * Dusty books.
* An assortment of neglected books. * They're all very dusty.

name: asg_home.int_hallway.drawer1
children: * This drawer is empty, save for some crayons.

name: asg_home.int_hallway.drawer2
children: * Nothing but flowers.
* Huh. * There's a miniature Froggit living in the flowers.
* It looks at me... ribbits... and then returns to existing.
* ...?! * This drawer is filled with golden flowers!
* ... that, and the remains of seed packets.

name: asg_home.int_hallway.flower
children: * It's a golden flower. * There seem to be a lot of these around here.

name: asg_home.int_hallway.mirror
children: * Never felt better.
* It's me, !

children: * The fridge is filled with unopened containers of... snails?
* Yuck.

name: asg_home.int_kitchen.pie
children: * It's a burnt butterscotch-cinnamon pie.
* I guess ASGORE wasn't the baking type.
* I guess ASGORE isn't the baking type.

name: asg_home.int_kitchen.sink
children: * There's some white fur stuck in the drain.

* The stovetop is very clean. * Perhaps ASGORE uses magic to cook?

* Books on gardening and tea...
* A history book catches my eye.
Yes
No

* "With nowhere else to go, we could only retreat into the caverns."
* "And upon meeting their end, we created our brand new home."
* "The City of..." * "Home."
* "While lacking originality... it served its purpose."

children: * Nothing useful.

* Yet another mystery of the world.

name: asg_home.int_livingroom.couch
children: * No time to relax.

name: asg_home.int_livingroom.emptychair

name: asg_home.int_livingroom.flower

children: next time is now.
don't say i didn't warn ya.
but, hey. don't worry... there's a throne ahead with your name on it.
Deep in the depths of hell.
because pretty soon, that whole attitude is going to change.
what? you didn't notice me powering up?
sorry, i'll give you a heads-up next time.
that's why you're doing this anyways, isn't it?
just to see what'll happen.
just because you need to know.
heh heh heh...
you like what you got?
either way, you'll never know.
and no matter what happens next...
that simple fact will never leave you alone.
wanna know the best part?
maybe i wasn't lying to you.
not entirely, anyways.
maybe, just maybe, some part of those goofy stories were true.
maybe, just maybe, some part of that whole spiel was true.
any second now, i'll get that phone call...
... and based on everything that's happened so far?
i'd say you're in for the same whole spiel you got again, again, and again...
you don't even remember you were supposed to kill everyone.
i mean, there are still other monsters besides me, last i checked.
you're gonna have a hard time catching up to them if you're ever done here.
but go on. keep wondering.
keep letting that curiosity of yours take charge.
it works for me, 'cause you keep getting distracted because of it.
what, you're wondering what i meant by that last thing?
hmm. yet another mystery to add to the pile, looks like.
all i can do, is what i can do.
hate to break it to you... but all of this?
it's more for me than it ever was for you.
just throw in the towel and let you walk all over me?
nah.
you might be a brick wall... but who's to say i can't have fun painting on it?
i mean, i know whatever i do won't get you to stop.
otherwise you would have stopped already.
so, what am i left to do?
if i didn't know better, i'd call you a prodigy.
the way you immediately saw right through me, all on your...
... which try was it again?
alright, let's cut the theatrics.
you're already well aware i'm just buying time.
in my prime, i aspired to be a farmer...
... what's up? you don't believe me?
aw, you just gotta ruin everything, don't you.
didn't you know they teach tragic backstories at superhero school?
it's got a very versatile program.
and despite all that, they still missed the most important part.
the punchline.
makes you shed a tear, doesn't it?
they put so much time into researching the things i say...
to the point of losing sight of what path they really should've taken.
looking to dissect our puns, combing over our culture, desperate to find...
something.
they did something like that to every sans on the planet.
you couldn't go making two jokes in public without the league swarming in.
and boy, were those suits diligent in their duties.
once, i picked up a kitchen knife to cut my sandwich in half...
and one of them breaks into my house, and asks if it's my "new secret weapon."
our planet was recently investigated by a group of black suits.
a secret organization, known only by their official name...
"League Of Sans Expert Researchers."
it's really a neat little place.
but much like earth has its flaws, like "taxes" and "monster murderers..."
our planet has its own share of problems.
on santurn, the sans race thrives strong.
little boney men everywhere, competing in stand-up acts to earn the champion belt.
y'see, my true home lies where the rest of my people are.
on a planet far outside the solar system.
"planet santurn."
to be entirely upfront with you...
i'm actually on vacation here.
i was gonna go back home yesterday, but all the flights were cancelled.
didn't you know they teach "not dying" at superhero school?
that's too bad.
but for you, it's just another thing you'll never learn.
the multi-watchers... will never get me, not in a million years...
not when i have my relative's power backing me up. in fact...
i have a (cough cough) part of him, right here...
thing is... (cough) all this world traveling comes with a price...
the more i do it, the more i seem to be coming down with some sickness.
and now you're here on their behalf, to haul me back to my original world.
even though i took on this superhero form, you still found me.
oh, well. soon as i kick your butt, there's plenty other worlds out there.
what's the "intent?" pff. don't act dumb.

to capture and bring 
me to the 
"multi-watchers", 
of course.
ever since i made other universes my home, i bet they didn't like that.
yet, it seems no matter which world i hide in...
i always seem to end up throwing fists with children at the end.
and that's certainly a pattern. leads me to believe we've fought before.
in different forms, perhaps, but with the same intent.
since then, folks blamed me for my relative's disappearance.
had no choice but to run, i guess. across universes, if i had to.
wouldn't it be somethin' if you got what i mean.
to lose family. to lose real talent, with the smarts to make lives better.
just 'cause of one simple mistake during another routine experiment.
my home, well, it ain't a place you'll find on any map.
but not a day passes where i don't think about what i left there...
... and the things i took with me, that i shouldn't have.
what's with the face?
you know exactly what i'm talking about.
you and me... neither of us belong to this world.
i didn't think this one would be it either, y'know.
something or other always makes things end this way.
and it's not like i wanna expect the worst, but you don't make it easy.
didn't you know they teach dodging at superhero school?

name: battles.kk.name
children: Koffin-K

name: battles.kk.sb
children: So... this is it.
The fearsome Count Koffin-K, reduced to yesterday's garbage...!
And double-crossed by my own Servant, no less...
... B-but! You haven't bested me YET!
I still have! A backup plan, yes!
You'll be defeated! I'll take the CROWN JEWEL!
And then! I'll... I'll have...
Everything... I...
Oh, Servant...
What am I doing?!
The whole village, perhaps the whole UNDERGROUND...
And you, Servant, who has been there for me against all overwhelming odds...
I've turned everyone against me.
The old days, when it was just me and Crossbones, are over!
Like a fool, I've made everyone into my arch-nemesis!
I... I'm too good at being evil...
I'm so evil, I hate it!!
Servant. No...
Human!
It is thanks to you that I can promise this.
No longer will I trouble the village with random schemes.
From here on, it's a fresh new start for Koffin-K!
He'll change his ways! He'll be a friend to the people!
He won't question any strange rumbling noises from behind him!
Already off to a bad start.
Uh, little help.
Uh, little help.
He'll get picked up by his kind understanding Servant!
Please?
From here on, it's a fresh new start for Koffin-K!
He'll change his ways! He'll be a friend to the people!
Servant. No...
Human!
It is thanks to you that I can promise this.
No longer will I trouble the village with random schemes.
Uh, little help.
I KNEW IT! I KNEW IT!!!
YOU...
Ooooh, you... YOU...
How COULD you, Servant?! I thought we were a team...?
Of course, there's still the Navy I'll have to contend with...
First, there's the dog scouts...
... Except the ones on lunch break...
Then the soldiers, AND the Admiral, and, and...
Though, without those dogs, I'll have a head start...
First, there's the dog scouts...
Then the soldiers, AND the Admiral, and, and...
You must have been an agent of CROSSBONES! All this time!
That... that's right! THAT'S how he showed up so quickly!
But! That's where your and Crossbones's counter-plans to MY plan end!
It was a MISTAKE to trust you!
A human, here? And willing to do my laundry?
All too good to be true!
Why, perhaps you might regret your alliances...
... When you're strung up like the cloth you've been drying! MWAHAHAHA!
Yeah, that was pretty stupid, wasn't it.
Your POINT, Servant?!
Just what point are you trying to make, Servant?!
Ha! W-wait, I'm laughing AT you, not WITH you!
You sure showed kindness to some PAPIER-MACHE!
DID SOMEBODY CALL MY NAME???
Did you hear something?
But who'll slip on it now?! THE FLIES?
That was the most tense I've been in years...
How is depriving yourself of the simple joys good?!
Just what point are you trying to make, Servant?!
Your POINT, Servant?!
Real candy...? Why, that's more than I get sometimes!
You FOOL! That's Jeremy's WRATH you're toying with!
Someday, I'll get around to eating it!
Yeouch! Alas, brutal honesty!
R-Right, I'm wearing the very thing...
Pray, why are you proving my point?!
This mishap deters me not from being slightly less evil!
What is that even supposed to mean?!
What, you think THIS isn't the perfect lifestyle for me?
Terrifying the locals, giving them reason to run at my visage?
How else will people remember me, Servant?!
And just because nobody else likes it, doesn't mean...
Just because I have to beg them not to run, i-it...
Th-This is...!! What are you implying?
That I don't have anyone else I could have fun with?!
Look at me, I'm an evil villain, are those usually FUN?
So what if that drives away people from being my friends?!
So what if I'm paying them to talk to me every single day?!
I...!! I do it, because...!
Bah, please!
How many eons ago was that again?
All that matters is what I've witnessed of you here!
HERE, at this very festival!
You were really trying to impress me...?
Wait, t- That doesn't matter!
All that matters is what I've witnessed of you here!
HERE, at this very festival!

name: battles.md.act0
children:
* DUMMY - AT 0 DF YES
* Such a tattered old mess, staring right into nothingness.
Good, very good!
If you ACT to CHECK your opponent...
You may learn something useful about them!
Further on, you may use that information to your advantage...
And ACT further to find a peaceful resolution, if possible.
I've had it.
I've had it!
I'VE HAD IT!!!

EX-CUSE ME?! 
I'm RIGHT HERE, you little ANKLE-BITING BRAT!!
Yeah, that's RIGHT! I heard you MUTTERING to yourself!!
"Tattered old mess" THIS, "staring into nothingness" THAT!!

name: battles.md.act0
children: * Check

name: battles.md.act1
children: * I walk up to the dummy and say "Howdy!"
* Unfortunately, it gives no response.
Wonderful! I see you've made a new friend!
It seems like they no longer wish to fight you, even!
Perhaps all they wanted was someone to talk to.
From here, you can show your opponent MERCY and SPARE them.
* I ask the dummy what it thinks of the weather.
* Again, no response.
Ho ho ho! That's adorable, young one.
You must remember that we're underground!
There's no weather down here, unfortunately.
* I ask the dummy about life's many mysteries.
* ... It seems I'll remain ignorant for good.
Enjoying time with your friend?
My, how wonderful!
Though, there's still more we should tend to.
* I stare at the dummy. * The dummy stares back.
* I'm at a loss for words.
Come now, child! Let us continue!
* I walk up to the dummy and say "Goodbye!"
* As expected, nothing happ--
I've had it.
I've had it!
I'VE HAD IT!!!
YOU!!!
That's ALL you have to say?!
After everything we went through TOGETHER...
You're just going to say GOODBYE?!?
Like NOTHING even MATTERED?!?!

name: battles.md.act1
children: * Talk

name: battles.md.asg_intro
children: Let's begin, then!
In a battle, you have many options at your disposal.
For one, you may ACT to resolve things peacefully...
Show your opponent MERCY...
Make use of an ITEM you have on hand...
... or, if push comes to shove, FIGHT your way out.
Why don't you give them a try?

name: battles.md.asg_outro
children: Well, I suppose that's all you needed to learn!
I hope you enjoyed our little lesson!
Now, before we go...
How about you say goodbye to the dummy?

name: battles.md.bar
children: Ah! You have an ITEM on you?
Good! They can be very useful in battle.
Especially if you need to heal.
However, you should only use them if needed!
You don't want to waste them, do you?
Come now, child.
You mustn't waste your items!
Who knows what you may need them for?
Oh, dear. Are you hungry, child?
Don't worry! While I don't want to spoil the surprise...
Let's just say... there's more treats to come!
* Waste not, want not.
* I should save the God Cheese for later.
* I should save the Chocolate Bar for later.
* Deciding that I deserve a treat, I take out the God Cheese.
* I can almost tast--
I've had it.
I've had it!
I'VE HAD IT!!!
Oh, LOOK AT YOU!
You have a GOD CHEESE, and you don't even think to SHARE?!
What if I WANTED some?! Even just a LITTLE BIT?!?
You have a CHOCOLATE BAR, and you don't even think to SHARE?!
What if I WANTED some?! Even just a LITTLE BIT?!?
* Deciding that I deserve a treat, I tear open the Chocolate Bar.
* I can almost tast--
I've had it.
I've had it!
I'VE HAD IT!!!
Oh, LOOK AT YOU!

name: battles.md.end
children: And!! AND...!!!
You REALLY think you can solve your problems by TALKING IT OUT?!?
Well, I have news for you, DUMMY!!!
NOBODY is going to listen to your "HOWDY" when they're trying to KILL YOU!!!!
Not to mention... you stood there TAUNTING ME with that CHEESE!
Taking it out, putting it back... over and OVER AGAIN!
It's like you WANTED me to SUFFER!!
I come here in search of a REAL opponent...
And I get stuck with YOU?!?!
I have NEVER been insulted like this in ALL MY LIFE!!
Your mere presence has just... made me SO...
Mad. Livid. ABSOLUTELY ENRAGED!!!
AND DO YOU KNOW WHAT I DO WHEN I'M MAD?!!
I swear I have more knives. Usually.
THIS ISN'T OVER!!!
Mark my words with your brightest marker, human! From this moment forth...
We are MORTAL RIVALS!!!!!!!!
Well, that was... unexpected!
However, you still did a great job!
Not to mention... you stood there TAUNTING ME with that CHOCOLATE!
Taking it out, putting it back... over and OVER AGAIN!
It's like you WANTED me to SUFFER!!

children: we're not your outlet.
if anything, we're more alike than you'd think.
and, well... to fight someone i could've related to in another life...
it's just not an appealing thought.
... so how about it?
you feelin' the same way?
thing is, kid, you were able to run away when things got too hard.
we have the BARRIER to deal with.
we'll be stuck dealing with the grief you caused for the rest of our lives.
so whether or not you ran from the surface to make your own choices...
... what's it gonna matter if you'll just use them to take away ours?
eventually, you'll no longer have anyone to make choices with.
and you'll be back to having just one left.
trapped under the mountain, dreaming of seeing the light...
the same light you lived under everyday.
but even as the prospect of that seemed too whimsical, we chose to hold onto that dream.
look. i kinda get it.
life isn't all laughs when you're not allowed a choice.
everybody down here is well aware of that.
what's wrong? subject's too sensitive for you?
if you were trying to hide it, you shouldn't have made it so obvious.
so, self-defense? nah. i don't buy it.
you don't self-defend against an entire isle of people and still be scared.
my guess is... this isn't just about the underground, is it?
there has to be a reason you came here to begin with.
so, self-defense? nah. i don't buy it.
you don't self-defend against bugs and plants and act like you're scared about it.
my guess is... this isn't just about the underground, is it?
there has to be a reason you came here to begin with.
so, self-defense? nah. i don't buy it.
you don't self-defend against an entire isle of people after proving you didn't need to.
my guess is... this isn't just about the underground, is it?
there has to be a reason you came here to begin with.
jabs aside. it's pretty clear one escalation led to another.
all because neither side had the idea to talk it out.
but history's already proven, you were in more power to do that than us.
now, things have gotten so bad, you need a skeleton to tell you about this.
jabs aside. it's pretty clear one escalation led to another.
all because neither side had the idea to talk it out sooner.
but history's already proven, you were in more power to do that than us.
now, things have gotten bad enough, you need a skeleton to tell you about this.
jabs aside. it's pretty clear one escalation led to another.
all because everyone lost any faith in being able to talk it out.
but history's already proven, you were in more power to do that than us.
now, things have gotten so bad, you need a skeleton to tell you about this.
"if only i knew they didn't wanna fight, i wouldn't have to do this."
doesn't sound familiar?
boy, this would've been way different if someone thought of that, huh.
"if only i knew they didn't wanna fight, i wouldn't have to do this."
sounds familiar?
boy, this would've been way different if someone thought of that earlier, huh.
"if only i knew they didn't wanna fight, i wouldn't have to do this."
sounds familiar?
boy, this would've been way different if someone thought that consistently, huh.
between our past with the humans, and your unpredicted arrival...
we couldn't fathom what you were like.
all we knew is your power outmatched all of ours combined.
"if only there was a sign..."
to be fair, i don't doubt this all began from a kneejerk reaction.
the monsters attacking you had their own fears to deal with.
most of them tied to the guys upstairs that stuck us in here.
to be fair, you're not the only one with a knack for kneejerk reactions.
the monsters attacking you had their own fears to deal with.
most of them tied to the guys upstairs that stuck us in here.
i wonder what you were getting out of being friendly.
i mean, surely you must've wondered, why those big scary monsters gave you any chance to spare them.
maybe it's because you weren't the only scared creature stuck in a cave.
i'm guessing you think of your actions as some form of self-defense.
how very convenient.
here you came, slashing your way through monsters like it was routine.
but the moment someone calls you out, you suddenly remember that you're scared.
you must think of your actions as some form of self-defense.
my opinion? i think you have no clue what you're doing.
unless you're saying that after what happened, you're suddenly all for hugs and friendship?
i'm guessing you think of your actions as some form of self-defense.
that's not even the most ironic part.
here i am, trying to teach you about the value of making friends...
... when you already made my point for me at the start.
but then, you showed up.
and what happened to our domino?
he fell down. but impacted everyone connected to him in the process.
every life he touched, left behind as a reminder of what you did.
they start getting back up...
spreading word of your deeds...
... and making sure nobody forgets about what you did.
in fact, i have a domino for you right here.
he's just a little guy. a little man.
he's got his own little hopes and dreams.
maybe he'll even go to a little college.
think of a line of dominos.
you knock one over, and they all fall down, right?
crossbones tried his best, too.
it's important to have a beacon of hope, especially the kind that can be in several places at once.
as for you...
your consequences confide you to just one place.
not that your defense squad de-escalated the tension.
on top of the festival being called off...
... we had to deal with in-fighting over whether you really meant to kill us all.
what a mess. half the monsters only evacuated when we forced them to.
do you get it? your consequences don't go away that easily.
compared to a human like you, most monsters are fragile.
and they only grow more vulnerable the less they see you as a threat.
you must've taken advantage of both those facts by waiting this long to pull the trigger, huh?
eh, whatever. late or early, you're going to have to face the music eventually.
unsurprisingly, you kept up your killing throughout the woods.
the navy started evacuations, but, well...
i think we both know how that went.
but, to our surprise... the evacuations here went off without a hitch.
everyone was accounted for, including those who made contact with you.
some even defended you from the other monsters, last i saw 'em.
everything was happening so fast, the navy scrambled to evacuate people.
some monsters were able to get to safety. as for the rest...
well, i think you know "the rest" better than me.
you really made a name for yourself right off the bat.
thanks to your rampage in ruined home, plus the warning papyrus got from his friend...
word of a killer human spread across the underground.
out of the blue, monsters started going missing.
and wouldn't you know it, but at that same time... a human showed up.

name: crys.mines_checkpoint_flee
children: * Oh? Changed your mind, have you?
* Well, perhaps you'll reconsider after... THIS!
* The cage -- you were -- you needed to be --
* ... Oh, blast it all!
* Admiral! Sgt Splosion, reporting!
* The human, it's -- it's escaping!
* ... The cage?
* The cage!
* Yes, it's... * Well, you see...
* I... I'LL BE RIGHT BACK!

name: crys.mines_checkpoint_leave
children: * Just you wait, human!
* Sgt Splosion will NOT be thwarted so easily!

name: crys.mines_checkpoint_one
children: * HALT! Who goes there?!
* "Just passing through," are you?
* Hm, yes, good, how very normal to do!
* Seems there's no reason for me to stand in your way.
* Carry on then!

name: crys.mines_checkpoint_three
children: * Check on the human? * Yes, Admiral!
* ADMIRAL! It got out, it- it lockpicked the cage, I think!
* I will pursue it posthaste!
* Admiral! * I... can't get around the cage.

name: crys.mines_checkpoint_two

* SPLOSION

* Thanks to our EXTENSIVE documentation, courtesy of the Admiral...
* I am extraordinarily well-versed in what humans look like!
* As a soldier of the ROYAL NAVY, most esteemed...
* I will NOT let you pass! * Or my name isn't...
* SGT
* SGT
* SPLOSION
* SPLOSION
* THE
* THE
* THIRD
* THIRD
* ESQUIRE
* ESQUIRE
* Now, don't - hohoho - don't go anywhere!
* I am going to contact the next person you'll be meeting!
* Admiral! Sgt Splosion, reporting!
* I've found the human, Admiral!

name: crys.mines_crys_start_giant_crystal
children: * (I lose myself in the glimmering majesty of the crystal...)
* (It's a huge crystal growth, sparkling rhythmically around my four reflections.)
* (Someday, this towering monstrosity could be a ring on someone's finger.)

name: crys.mines_crys_start_pap_int
children: ARE YOU OBSERVING THE CRYSTAL, TOO?
... WHY ARE YOU STARING AT ME LIKE THAT?
IS THERE SOMETHING ON ME??
WAS IT SANS?!?!?!
NYEH HEH... HEH?

NYEH.
HEH? 
HEH!!!
NYEH!! HEH!! HEH!!
NYEH HEH HEH!!!
WHAT DOES IT *MEAN* TO BE... "PAPYRUS" ...
AN INTERESTING QUESTION, TO BE SURE.
AND, WITH AN INTERESTING ANSWER:
NYEH HEH HEH!!!
I'VE ALWAYS WANTED TO BE AN ARTIST...
AND A RACECAR DRIVER.
AND AN ASTRONAUT.
BUT MOSTLY, JUST PAPYRUS.
... "WHAT AM I DOING HERE?"
OH, YOU KNOW! NOTHING IN PARTICULAR.
JUST... OBSERVING... ...
THIS CRYSTAL! YES!
IT'S FOR... A PAINTING!
BUT FIRST, I NEED TO STUDY ITS FORM.

name: crys.mines_crys_start_sign
children: * "North: Navy Checkpoint"
* "East: Crystal Mines"
* "West: Starlight Isles"

name: crys.mines_crys_start_switch
children: * (There's a hidden switch behind the crystal.)
* (Press it?)
Yes
No
* What? HEY!
* Who pressed that button?
* ... Oh, blast it all!
* The cage won't budge!
* Sgt Splosion will NOT be thwarted so easily!
WAIT, HOW DID YOU KNOW THAT WAS THERE???

NO ONE EVER CHECKS 
INCONSPICUOUSLY 
SHINY BIG CRYSTALS!
... WELL, IT'S PROBABLY GOOD YOU DID THAT.
THIS ROAD LEADS TO THE MINES!
NOT THE SAFEST ROUTE, I'LL ADMIT...

... ON ACCOUNT OF 
THE... FALLING 
DEBRIS, CAVE INS...
... POINTY ROCKS, ROCKY POINTS...
BUT, IT'S MAYBE SAFER THAN DEALING WITH THE NAVY!!
YOU GO ON! IF ANYONE COMES BY, I'LL TELL THEM...

SOMETHING... VAGUE, 
BUT TECHNICALLY 
CORRECT.
I HOPE YOU HAVE LOTS OF FUN IN THE MINES!
* (There's a switch on the wall, here...)
* (Seems like it's already activated.)

name: crys.mines_pap_post_splosion
children:
I HEARD EXPLOSIONS. 
DID YOU MEET 
THE SERGEANT?
WOWIE! YOU'D BE THE FIRST HUMAN HE'S MET!
HE CALLED THE ADMIRAL, DIDN'T HE?
... OKAY, THAT'S PRETTY BAD.
ONCE HE'S ON A MISSION, HE DOES NOT LET IT GO.
HOWEVER, I THINK PAPYRUS HAS THE SOLUTION!
THIS ROAD LEADS TO THE MINES!

NOT THE SAFEST 
ROUTE, I'LL ADMIT...

... ON ACCOUNT OF 
THE... FALLING 
DEBRIS, CAVE INS...
... POINTY ROCKS, ROCKY POINTS...
BUT, IT'S MAYBE SAFER THAN DEALING WITH THE NAVY!!
YOU GO ON! IF ANYONE COMES BY, I'LL TELL THEM...

SOMETHING... VAGUE, 
BUT TECHNICALLY 
CORRECT.
PLUS, MY BROTHER KNOWS THE ADMIRAL. HE COULD HELP TOO!
I LOVE IT WHEN A PLAN COMES TOGETHER!!
NYEH HEH HEH!
I LOVE IT WHEN A PLAN COMES TOGETHER!!
NYEH HEH HEH!

name: crys.premines_alphys_encounter
children: * Human! I hope you--
* H... human?
* IT'S RUNNING AWAY, ADMIRAL
* Ah!
* Thought you could evade me, jah?
* Well... think again!
* I am ADMIRAL ALPHYS of ze ROYAL NAVY.
* And I... am your strongest foe yet.
* Zat is right. * Zis is a live feed, human!
* Up until zis point, I have vatched your every step.
* Your struggles, your triumphs...
* Und your attempt just now, to evade my all-seeing gaze...
* It only proves you to be scared out of your vits, as you should be!
* For zis... * Zis is MY domain.
* I know every rock, plant, und crevice vithin these mines.
* Und nothing, NOTHING goes under mine vatchful eye, jah?
* Even if you attempt zis... silly little escape attempt...
* My dear sergeant vill follow you in close pursuit.
* I'LL BE RIGHT THERE, ADMIRAL
* THIS CAGE -
* IT'S BEING -
* DIFFICULT

* You see? 
* Zere is novhere to run. 
* Novhere to hide, either.
* Tut-tut, vhat a shame...
* Zee only option left... is for you to surrender.
* Save us both time und energy, jah?
* Hah hah hah...
* Zat is "checkmate," mine little vermin!
* Und the vay you looked at my little video I've prepared...
* As if none of it vas true, hah! * Like you can fool moi!
* Non, you cannot! For zis... * Zis is MY domain.
* I know every rock, plant, und crevice vithin these mines.
* Und nothing, NOTHING goes under mine vatchful eye, jah?
* Even if you attempt zis... silly little escape attempt...
* My dear sergeant vill follow you in close pursuit.
* I'LL BE RIGHT THERE, ADMIRAL
* THIS CAGE -
* IT'S BEING -
* DIFFICULT

* You see? 
* Zere is novhere to run. 
* Novhere to hide, either.
* Tut-tut, vhat a shame...
* Zee only option left... is for you to surrender.
* Save us both time und energy, jah?
* Hah hah hah...
* Zat is "checkmate," mine little vermin!
* Up until zis point, I have vatched your every step.
* Your struggles, your triumphs...
* Human! I hope you--
* H... human?
* IT'S RUNNING AWAY, ADMIRAL
* Ah!
* Thought you could evade me, jah?
* Well... think again!
* If all else fails, our Admiral of the Royal Navy knows best!
* With her experience in the world of humans, she'll guide us to a better tomorrow!
* Don't believe me? Here is a speech from the Admiral, to the monsters all over!
* Ah, visitor, allow me to introduce myself...
* I am ADMIRAL ALPHYS of ze ROYAL NAVY.
* And I... am your strongest foe yet.

name: crys.premines_alphys_psa_one
children: * Do YOU know how to recognize a human?
* It's easier than you think! * Unlike monsters, humans fall under one category of species.
* But there's more to them than just looks! They don't move or think like you do!
* The following are just a few ways to tell apart your worst enemy from an odd stranger!

name: crys.premines_alphys_psa_three
children: * Some humans were reported performing erratic movements in the shadows of the walls.
* The speed this grants them makes them nearly invisible to the naked eye...
* If you ever see a strange blur that fits this description, chances are, IT'S A HUMAN!
* Do not approach, or get their attention! Distance yourself to a safe spot first.
* Then, speed-dial your Royal Navy hotline, state your name, and the blur's location!
* That's right, the Royal Navy speed-dial! Every phone has one!

name: crys.premines_alphys_psa_two
children: * Listen well for their wavering logic. They'll say one thing, then do the exact opposite!
* Centuries of evolution taught them to repeat the words YOU want to hear.
* An example: A human approaches you with a butter steak knife, asking "You want a sandwich?"
* What would YOU do in this scenario? Would you eat that knife?
* JUST because they said it was a sandwich?
* Remember, humans may be unable to lie, but lack of conscience is just as dangerous!

name: crys.psa_backtrack_blocker
children: * (The gate closed behind me.)

name: extra_demo_end
children: Golly, what a cliffhanger!

How are you enjoying 
the ride?

The lift, I mean. 
Cozy little box, isn't it?

Well, settle in. It's going 
to take a while before you 
reach Crystal Springs.

You'll have to prepare 
against the Navy soldiers 
awaiting you down there.

The mines themselves 
aren't exactly safe 
either...

Who knows what'll 
prove more dangerous 
in the end?

As for me, I've been 
making some itty bitty 
preparations of my own!
But that'd be telling.

Get some rest. Drift off 
into another world.

I'll be there when it's 
time to say "good morning."

name: extras.buger_disclaimer.no
children: No

name: extras.buger_disclaimer.text
children:
~ Bugerpant: Origins ~

This is an ~11 minute animation we
made for April Fools' Day 2020.

Since it was coded in-game, we
decided to keep it as an extra.

You cannot skip this cutscene.
Proceed?

name: extras.buger_disclaimer.yes
children: Yes

name: extras.bugerpant_origins.end
children: * And there you have it.
* Like a box of fries going stale and uneaten in the rain...
* ... This is where my story comes to an end.
* My big break... never happened.
* And so off I go, back to the marching monotony of everyday life.
* So many questions left unanswered.
* Why did Mettalot want a coffee if he's a ghost?
* How did I end up with a nickname like "Bugerpant?"
* And... will I ever get that chance to impress?
* I don't know, little buddy.
* But I do know this: I'll keep hoping, and I'll keep dreaming.
* So long, little buddy.
* So long...

name: extras.bugerpant_origins.grillbys
children: * It all started in Grillby's...
* A place slicked with grease as far as the eye can see.
* That day, I was filling in for that old fry cook again.
* It wasn't part of the job description...
* But with how many times he skipped out to snooze?
* They couldn't afford to have nobody cooking.
* And so, only one man would take the task nobody else could...
* Ugggghhhh.
* Huh? What's the matter, darlin'?
* Oh, nothing! Nothing at all.
* I'm just incredibly sick of this job
* my pointless life
* and everything else
* Aw, lighten up! * It could be worse, couldn't it?
* Flara. I am the ONLY delivery boy for Grillby's.
* The chain of fast food restaurants
* That spans across the ENTIRE UNDERGROUND
* And I am the only delivery boy
* Well, then why are ya workin' the...
* ... Oh, yeah. Contract?
* YEP! Contract.
* "In the event of unforeseen absence of vital personnel,"
* "You are to temporarily assume their responsibilities,"
* "... and ignore any delivery calls, which are to be made up later."
* Yeah.
* W-well...
* Hey, at least Aaxel isn't puttin' the moves on ya, right?
* Wouldn't THAT be worse?
* Fair.
* See? Just gotta look at the bright side.
* Yeah, yeah. I know, I know, it's just...
* (Sigh...) I wish I could be doing more with my life.
* I came into this job thinking it would help me, right?
* Meet people, get connections...
* But it's done NOTHING!
* Oh, if only I could get out of here!
* To fulfill my dreams of being an ACTOR...!
* Oh, here we go again...
* Come on, Flara! Imagine it!
* The adoring fans, the popularity...
* The BABES!
* A whole future out there, just waiting for me!
* Haw haw haw! * Yeah, right! ; )
* You think you got a chance, loser? ; )
* ... Oh, shi
* ... Aaxel.
* Flara~ ; )
* ... Man, I can't keep listening to this! ; )
* What makes YOU think you'll make it big? ; )
* Yeah! Someone stuck in a dead-end job like this?
* You'rrrrrrrre hopeless!
* Burgle wurgle!
* H-heh, just you wait, Grease-suckers.
* It's only a matter of time until I make it big!
* And THEN we'll see who's laughing!
* Really? And how are ya gonna do that, hotshot? ; )
* You think some big opportunity's just gonna fall on you? ; )
* Haw! Like those moldy patties that flopped onto your fat head, that smell like-
* For your information, meathead...
* Flara's already scraped those off the ceiling!
* Y'know, because we like to keep ourselves and our work environment...
* "CLEAN."
* Unlike SOME monsters.
* G-GLURB?!
* Yeah, don't think for a second I've forgotten what YOU did.
* (Those stains. I still see them in my nightmares...)
* I hearrrd Mettalot is perrrforming in the parrrk~!
* Oooh, Mettalot~? ; )
* Some spicy intel from the Norm, as per the norm! ; )
* Psht. Yeah, yeah, that's great for you, buddy.
* How about you go and watch him, then?
* Because, unlike you...
* SOME of us have JOBS. Very IMPORTANT job--
* (Huh? Flara, what--)
* Wait a minute...
* OH MY GOD?!
* That's RIGHT! Mettalot is an ACTOR!
* If I can convince him to let me work with him...
* I could be a FAMOUS ACTOR!
* The kind you get to promote crappy video games and cereal!
* I could be... I COULD BE A STAR!
* MOVE IT, slippery-do! I got a CAREER to kickstart!

name: extras.bugerpant_origins.intro
children: * Hey there, little buddy.
* You may be wondering who I am.
* And what I'm doing here.
* Well... I'm bound by contract to keep my name a secret.
* So you can call me... "<span class="yellow">Bugerpant."
* It's not a name I picked, nor one that I like.
* But at the end of the day... it's what I'm stuck with.
* I was once young, just like you.
* So full of hopes and dreams, wriggling around like worms in an apple.
* But on that fateful day... destiny had other plans in store.
* Today, I'm going to tell you a story of a great misfortune.
* Like a stormy sky of nothings, raining hopelessness upon me...
* This was the day that ruined my life.
* And took almost everything from me in the process.
* Leaving me a broken man, with no identity to call my own...
* Just an empty shell with a fake name.
* This... is my story.
* This is...

name: extras.bugerpant_origins.square
children: * Welcome.
* Today, you're here because you wanted to experience something new.
* But before we go ahead, I must advise you:
* This is no mere "performance."
* Together, we shall take the stage...
* And create a brand new world.
* Something that has never truly existed before.
* So please, do prepare yourselves...
* For a performance to rock your world and steal your heart...
* And, of course...
* Drama!
* Action!
* Romance!
* And last but not least...
* Me!
* Oh, so many faces in the crowd!
* I'm so flattered that all of you came to see me!
* It really is a dream come true~!
* But, wait! This is BETTER than a mere dream, isn't it?
* I'm sharing this delightful experience...
* With all of you, my adoring fans~!
* Excited, are we? * Well, it gets better!
* For today's show... is no ordinary show.
* One lucky monster will be able to come on-stage...
* And perform alongside yours truly!
* Now, who would be willing to join me?
* Oh, oh! Me, Mettalot! Pick me!
* Mettalot, pick me! I'm your biggest fan!
* Ribbit, robbit! (Oh, do choose me!)
* Mettalot Is Love Mettalot Is Life
* My, my! Quite the enthusiasm we have here!
* I'm not sure who to pick!
* Perhaps whoever shows the most adoration for me wi--
* OH MY GOD METTALOT PICK ME?!
* Well, everyone, it looks like we have a winner!
* Come on up here, darling!
* I have something special in mind for you.
* Now, what's your name, my newest contender?
* O-oh! I'm, heh, I'm... uh...
* (Sigh...) Here we go again...
* (Ahem.)
* I'm contractually obligated to tell you that my name is, uh...
* "Bugerpant."
* As you can see, it says so on my nametag.
* My, what an... interesting name!
* I understand why, however.
* You do?
* Of course! That grease-stained uniform...
* The aura of fast food and unhappiness...
* And those bags under your eyes?
* You're obviously a delivery boy!
* Working tirelessly for the corporate giant...
* Forced to confine to a terrible name for the sake of business!
* Oh, what a terrible tale! Simply dreadful!
* T-that's right, Mettalot! Heh!
* You know, I really aspire to be an actor instead of-
* Yes, yes. That's nice and all, but we have a show!
* Now, er... "Burger Boy," was it?
* Since you obviously have no acting experience...
* But, I-
* Today, I'm going to teach you how to be an actor!
* (OH MY GOD IT'S MY DREAM COME TRUE)
* Think you're up for the task, Burger Boy?
* I'm MORE than ready!!!
* Wonderful! Now, your first task...
* I'll take a double mocha chocolate latte double shot extra whip
* don't go easy on the sugar LOTS of cream shaken, not stirred,
* And make it snappy, darling! I don't have all day, you know.
* Didn't you hear me?
* I DID, but... I thought we were going to act...?
* And indeed we are! By playing your role as the delivery boy...
* ... You're doing a phenomenal job at sustaining my own act!
* I... are you kidding me?
* You're my IDOL! You're the reason I want to ACT!
* And you want me to...
* To just... get you a coffee?
* Well, to be specific, it's a double mocha chocola-
* No, screw this. * You're a hack.
* I... can't believe this.
* I'm out of here.
* Hmph, how rude. And we were just getting to the good part.
* Fear not, however, as the show must go on!

name: flowey.protips
children: * Come on, kid! * Don't you have anything better to do?
* I bet there's somebody in the right alley somewhere...
* Someone that could use a "pick-me-up."
* If you catch my drift.
* What if there's a sweet old lady who needs some help?
* Try asking around!
* There could be a crossword waiting to be solved!
* The people who made it don't go out of this area much, you know.
* Who knows? There could be a sad little plant in need of water!
* And it certainly isn't me, hee hee!
* Someone could have lost something important to them.
* How often does a star end up washed away?
* You have a whole world waiting for you outside that exit door.

name: ho_muffet.cc_rsp1
children: * Huh? And why is that your business?
* You're here to help me bake pastries, dearie.
* NOT chit-chat the days away.
* Ahuhuhu~
* Ahuhuhuhu~
* Why, no, I am-...
* How do I put this into perspective...?
* Imagine getting assistance from someone you despise...
* Not only that, but from an amateur creep like yourself.
* And you're not even the worst of it.
* Pish... but why would you care?

name: ho_muffet.cc_rsp2
children: * Hmph.
* Not like I've been trying to hide it.
* But it would be unwise of me to spin my troubles on a stranger.
* Children like you... never understand. They only ask too many questions.

name: ho_muffet.cc_rsp3
children: * ... You just keep setting yourself up.
* Let's test you again.
* What I'm about to describe, is a hypothetical. It did not really happen.
* Suppose you're managing your own bakery.
* The logistics don't matter. You're doing well enough to be sustainable.
* You've got regulars. A cozy atmosphere. People to talk with.
* But if the opportunity were to present itself, to expand your business beyond a niche...
* If someone rich gave you that opportunity, would you turn it down?

name: ho_muffet.cc_rsp4
children: * No. You wouldn't.
* You only say you would because you're not living in the moment.
* Money is the force through which your passion comes alive.
* Without money, your passion rests only within you.
* That's how the world works. And that's why you'd take the opportunity.
* You'd allow that conniving leecher to host events in your establishment, alongside his rich buddy.
* You'd let them drive away your regulars in favor of all these other faces you don't recognize.
* But who cares? Everyone knows your bakery now, and you're doing better than ever.
* Stuck in a dream.
* Until it hits you that you got this far only because of them.
* Which puts them in a position to take it away from you.
* And they will~ They will get too big for their britches, and cut ties~
* And the rumors will spread, "What did Muffet do? What DID Muffet do?"
* They'll say, as they gravitate towards the ones who ran, rather than the one who stayed.
* You will look back on all your hard work, all of it used up to fund someone else's playground.
* As they forget about everything and anything you sacrificed to trust in their judgment...
* And then, and ONLY then, you will realize "I should've said no."
* THAT'S HOW THE WORLD REALLY WORKS.
* (Muffet breathes in and out.)
* That's right. You'd be foolish to pass it up.
* Money is the force through which your passion comes alive.
* Without money, your passion rests only within you.
* That's how the world works. And that's why you'd take the opportunity.
* You'd allow that conniving leecher to host events in your establishment, alongside his rich buddy.
* You'd let them drive away your regulars in favor of all these other faces you don't recognize.
* But who cares? Everyone knows your bakery now, and you're doing better than ever.
* Stuck in a dream.
* Until it hits you that you got this far only because of them.
* Which puts them in a position to take it away from you.
* And they will~ They will get too big for their britches, and cut ties~
* And the rumors will spread, "What did Muffet do? What DID Muffet do?"
* They'll say, as they gravitate towards the ones who ran, rather than the one who stayed.
* You will look back on all your hard work, all of it used up to fund someone else's playground.
* As they forget about everything and anything you sacrificed to trust in their judgment...
* And then, and ONLY then, you will realize "I should've said no."
* THAT'S HOW THE WORLD REALLY WORKS.
* (Muffet breathes in and out.)

name: ho_muffet.cc_rsp5
children: * Better...
* Getting there, at least.
* I don't know.
* ... That's why you're here. The real reason.
* A pastry made by a human... it'd surely put the bakery back on the map.
* Perhaps back to a point where I could lead it without anyone's help, but...
* Here we are.
* Cooking with the human I was supposed to kill.
* I just can't help but rely on others, can I... ahuhu~
* Makes me wonder, sometimes...
* Where would I be without my spiders.
* You have... no clue.
* Or maybe... you do, I don't know.
* ... That's why you're here. The real reason.
* A pastry made by a human... it'd surely put the bakery back on the map.
* Perhaps back to a point where I could lead it without anyone's help, but...
* Here we are.
* Cooking with the human I was supposed to kill.
* I just can't help but rely on others, can I... ahuhu~
* Makes me wonder, sometimes...
* Where would I be without my spiders.

name: ho_muffet.cc_rsp6
children: * They...
* They'd be hopelessly lost.
* Stomped on, swatted, screamed at...
* ... "Without me" ...
* I'm many things, but a sacrificer of my own kind is not one of them.
* What you saw was spider-themed cinnamon sticks, coated in chocolate~
* There's a specific image I have to maintain, and not only for the customers...
* ... But also ...
* ... The spiders have put their trust in me for a reason.

name: ho_muffet.cc_rsp7
children: * There it is.
* There's the words. Saw them coming from a mile away.
* I wasn't looking forward to hearing them, not at all...
* The very thought disgusted me, having to hear what I already knew from you.
* But not only are you right,
* You are the only person who's ever said that. Ever.
* And, in that sense, maybe... you're...
* Not such a bad human, after all.
* That'll be the only time you'll hear that from me for free~
* Your next compliment... will cost you big time~
* Right... the pastry must be done by now.
* Anyway, here is your free sample~
* (I got the SOUL Puff~)
* Oh, and... you don't need to really taste-test it, you know.
* It's not that I changed my mind... but rather, this is what I thought from the start~
* Oh, dear... you don't have any space to keep the SOUL Puff~
* You're not allowed to eat it in the kitchen either, so I'll just hold onto it for you~
* Anyway, here is your free sample~
* Look at that~ It came out great~
* (She says that, but I know my SOUL Puff~ was terrible. And this one's not even hot...)
* (Did she quickly swap it for a better one just to make me feel better...?)
* I'd advise a couple more lessons from someone else, but either way, good work~
* Take a look at your work of art~
* It's a literal ROCK~
* Actually, it might be harder than diamond after I put it through the oven~
* What if I put this up as a sort of "challenge food," served only to the toughest of monsters?
* A fifty thousand gold prize to absolutely no one who'll get through one bite~ Ahuhuhu~
* Hmm... well, it turned out about as well as I expected.
* This pastry is quite FLAKEY~
* But, it was built by you, and that makes it very special...
* ... As a way for me to attract more customers~ Ahuhuhu~
* ... Might have to apply some further creative touches to this one, though.
* Well, well...! The human's got some training after all~
* The pastry turned out absolutely PERFECT~~
* All thanks to my guidance and subliminal control over your actions, of course~
* Ahuhuhu~ I really am the greatest~
* (Muffet giggles for half a minute as I stand there.)
* Human... I'll let you in on a little secret.
* Monsters have as many stupid thoughts as children like you do~
* And I, the most refined of all monsters, couldn't even escape that.
* Seeing as a total of twenty million spiders have placed their trust in me...
* Yet I'm... getting hung up over one or two traitorous monsters?
* What kind of odds are these? What absolutely idiotic nonsense~
* Ahuhu~ I can't believe I just told you all of that, ahuhuhuhu~
* I don't even remember their names, ahuhuhuhuhuhu~
* This was stupid...
* And it's exactly what I needed.
* Thanks for listening~
* Right... the pastry must be done by now.
* Right... the pastry must be done by now.

name: ho_muffet.cutting_dough
children: * Oh, my... what technique!
* I've never seen someone wield a dough cutter this way, I...
* You are truly the- hey. Stop.
* STOP.
* I was being sarcastic~ You didn't even cut through the dough once, dummy~
* Allow me...
* (I stepped aside as Muffet took my place in front of the countertop.)
* (She pokes the cutter against the surface of the dough...)
* (It sounds like metal.)
* THAT EXPLAINS IT.
* Not that I don't trust you... but I'll put this in the oven myself~
* Don't worry, you won't have to count the exact seconds until it's done~
* My oven has its own timer~
* I actually don't trust you all that much~
* Well, that should be it for now.
* Now we... hmph. Now we wait, I suppose.
* Good treats come to those who wait~
* Well, that should be it for now.
* Now we... hmph. Now we wait, I suppose.
* (Making slow incisions around the dough, six cuts to create each spider-shaped cookie.)
* (I can tell Muffet forgot I'm in the room.)
* (I get ready to swing the cutter right into the dough... now!)
* (The dough was so rock-hard, the cutter was knocked out of my hands.)
* (Me and Muffet both looked up at the ceiling, where the cutter is now lodged within.)
* On second thought... we can skip this step.
* We'll just have this go in the oven as is~
* Aw... all that suspense, and you haven't even cut one finger off? That's a shame~
* Not that I don't trust you... but I'll put this in the oven myself~
* Don't worry, you won't have to count the exact seconds until it's done~
* My oven has its own timer~

name: ho_muffet.dry_choice
children: * Oh. Dirt. Yes, that will... most definitely sell, dearie.
* (Who are we selling this to, flowers???)
* Once you're done salivating, pick the wet ingredient next...
* A pastry made entirely out of salt? This I have to see~
* Look over these wet ingredients next, please~
* Ooh, I'd pick the one most likely to give you a heart attack too~
* Look over these wet ingredients next, please~
* Flour? I know we're baking something simple, but you couldn't have gone any safer than that~
* Look over these wet ingredients next, please~

HACK AWAY

name: ho_muffet.intro
children: * Welcome to The Kitchen~
* This isn't exactly how I envisioned you being here...
* Well, I'd like to believe you'll get to know my oven better this way~
* Now then~ Today we're going to bake the "SOUL Puff~"
* It's a rather simple pastry, which I chose specifically to meet your skill level~
* As implied before, everything here is at your full disposal.
* But as much as I'd love not to babysit you, I know you'd mess up even something this basic~
* That's why I'll grant you some mercy, and at least set out the ingredients~
* Let's have you start... with picking one of these dry ingredients~

MIX!!!

* Well, the dough looks solid enough, but...
* The real truth will come out when we see you eat it at the end~
* ... Oops, did I neglect to mention that? I thought it was obvious~
* Of course you'll have to taste-test your own creation. Down to the last bite~
* You would seriously risk the life of my customers... for your own safety? Please~

'it's best to get familiar with the basic ones.'

maybe it says something about that in here...?

wild.

is it supposed to be pointing in different directions like that?

children: whoa, hey, ever heard of personal space?
if you wanted a hug, you coulda just asked.
you sure like staring at me, don't you?
well, be warned. i'm really good at staring contests.

children: ... uh, wow, you're uh.
you're persistent about that, huh?
i don't think there's uh, anything about holding hands in here.
you might wanna try something else.
woah, take it easy, pal.
don't you think you're going a bit fast...?

name: ho_sans.interact_ip
children: you know, i'm not sure why we even need an IP address.
guess this book'll tell us why.
'the IP address represents a vague description of your location...'
welp, guess we know where we are now.
turns out, there's a note under this...
'note: not to be confused with location.'
kind of funny how location isn't the one to tell us where we are, huh?

name: ho_sans.interact_location
children: location, location, location...
says the x's on the grid represent the physical distance between us...
not sure what that has to do with hanging out...
could make for a mean game of battlesweeps, though.
oh, i forgot, there's a note right under this.
'note: not to be confused with IP address.'

you think i should check my pulse?
alright, and we've got some, er... poll arrows.
is that one pointing at me? very interesting.
makes you wonder what the other one's pointing towards.
food for thought.

well...

to play?

THAT'S THE POWER BUTTON.

YOU'LL FIND OUT IF YOU STOP INTERRUPTING ME!!
SO, AS I WAS SAYING...
DID YOU GET ALL OF THAT?
yeah, i think so.
GREAT!
NOW, LET'S SELECT OUR FIGHTERS.
I CHOOSE... SKULL CRUSHER!

says right there he's got low endurance.
SKULL CRUSHER HAS BEEN MY MAIN FOR YEARS, SANS. YOU KNOW THIS.
ok, well... i'm picking a fighter that isn't lame.
funnybone.

SANS, YOUR FIGHTER IS THE LAME ONE!

LOOK AT HOW LOW 
ITS ATTACK AND 
DEFENSE ARE!
yeah, and it's got crazy high endurance.
your fighter's gonna have a few good attacks, then tire out like, immediately.
SO WHAT? YOUR FIGHTER WILL BE DEFEATED IN A SINGLE BLOW!
well, that's only if you hit me. which you won't.

WHICH IS THE CLEARLY SUPERIOR FIGHTER?

SKULL
CRUSHER

name: int.star10heat.flamesman
children: * Staring off into the fiery pits of magma, and magma-like substances...
* It really lights up your own flame, you know?!
* I mean, it's the home of THE campfire! The one on TV!
* You hear all these stories, and you start to wonder...

* What's it like to make it big? 
* To have EVERYONE know your name?
* Just like Grillby...
* Hey... you wouldn't... mind doing something for me, would you?
* I actually have a resume I wanted to give to Grillby, but I...
* ... Never got the chance to give it to him, before he got big and went to Boreal Bluffs.
* I dunno how he stands the cold, but...
Yes

children: * And another thing, Larry! * Who's that Crossbones think he is, anyways?
* Lyin' to us about free nice cream... I tell ya, he's gonna get it!
* But ain't dat kinda weird, Harry? Dere weren't any traps or anything.
* It's like he was... just tryin' to get us away from dat kid.
* Oh, come on! That kid? * Next youse gonna be tellin' me that kid was...
* Was... the...
* L-Larry?
* Y... yeah, Harry?
* Are youse thinkin'...
* ... What yer thinking?

name: int.star16.bigmouth
children: * I suppose I can't really blame her.
* She's been trying to scrounge up enough money to reunite her family.
* Business used to be booming for her, but... * Apparently, things changed.
* Oh, you met the leader of the Spider Scouts, herself?
* She's quite a persistent saleswoman.
* I'm serious! My standards for what is considered edible is dropping by the second!
* I hear there's a bakery somewhere up ahead!
* It's a good thing too, I'm starving! I could eat just about anything, at this point!

name: int.star17.float
children: * Another route must be taken.
* Blocking my path.
* Enough reminiscing. * We've got places to be.
* ... Now that I think about it...
* Why would there even BE assassins down here?!
* Isn't that just a human thing?

* Come on, work with me here! 
* I need CONFIRMATION!
* Of course, there were other people's resumes I looked through.
* Many of them were self proclaimed assassins, the best in business...
* Yeah, well if they were so great, why were they all 5'9 in size?
* You can't make a tall 'n short duo out of AVERAGE HEIGHT assassins!
* Ah, takes me back to the very reason I hired the Boogiemen.
* It was a very complex screening process, which they barely passed...
* YOU AND YOU!
* Huh, whazzat?!
* Duhhh, you talkin' about me?
* YOUR NAMES RHYME! * YOU'RE PERFECT!
* Be my minions, please. * I have literally nobody.
* B-But I got dis janitor job, see! I'm a busy fella!
* Yeah, and, and I gots me, uh...
* ... I gots a dumpsta bag to sleep under!
* Oh, brother, you two wanna be stuck mopping floors forever?!
* Or, would you rather serve me in my quest to conquer the world...
* ... While occasionally also mopping my floors, if need be!
* LARRY! * Say "Okay, boss."
* Uhhhh, d'okay buoss...
* My god.
* You're hired.
* HARRY! * How good can you snap!
* I- I'm ready to cry! * I'm not joking...!!!
* You boys start working for me, tomorrow onward!
* So THAT'S where this went!
* Harry and Larry built this within their first days of henchmenry.
* Don't really know why, BUT it's perfect for the festival, isn't it?
* You know, if you squint your eyes... and stare at it from far away.
* And it's behind all the other parade floats, so it stands out less.
* ... but it's like I can't look away.
* I would like to stop looking at it.
* It's some kind of parade float. * ... Or a nightmare factory?
* Only a villain could make something so viscerally disturbing.

name: int.star17.flowey
children: * In any case, this isn't a good place to talk.
* Keep it moving. * You've got much ground to cover still.
* In any case, this isn't a good place to talk.
* Keep it moving. * You've got much ground to cover still.
* You-know-huhuhu~ and me had our talks in the past...
* I thought their... outreach could help me gather certain info.
* Secrets, that only hundreds of eyes would be able to pick up.
* These talks never went down like I wanted them to.
* They said "knowledge" doesn't matter for someone like them...
* I said, they're just scared because they have secrets of their own.
* Judging by the look on their face, I guess I was right!
* Lookie there!
* It's your toughest opponent yet.

* No budging this one.
* You'll just have totake the usual route.
* Oh, and... (Psst)
* Muffet is one of the few monsters that didn't escape...
* (Psst) She's probably listening in on this right now...
* Watch yourself.
* ANYWAY, NOTHING to worry about! This route should be PERFECTLY SAFE!
