name: int.star20.flowey
children: * So... this is how it ends.
* At this rate, they were about to throw an entire army at you.
* Little do they know. All it took was one puzzle.
* Look. You'll figure it out eventually.
* I've, uh...
* I'll just go and check up on a few things.
* I- You know I can't help you any more than that!
* These puzzles are all out of whack!
* It's all pressing switches, buttons, and pushing rocks!
* Literally none of this was designed for me to solve!
* Wipe that helpless look off your face already, yeesh!
* Okay...
* What I need you to do right now...
* ... Is to slow down.
* Take a deep breath.
* You're not gonna let this one thing completely destroy you.
* The green mushroom.
* If it faces right, you can angle yourself up or down.
* If it faces up, you can angle yourself left or right.
* You've got four directions to work with.
* Was that clear enough for you?
* Still nothing...?
* What about those buttons?
* The direction of the center shroom changes when you press them...
* Meaning, you could use that to access other places, right...?
* Hm... I'm also wondering about that mushroom behind the tree stump.
* If you could use the center mushroom to get to that one...
* Or you could just jump, but I guess having legs won't solve everything.
* Most of these shrooms just force you in one direction.
* But that one growing out of the water... it seems more controllable.
* Could you use that one to access other places?
* Puzzles.
* The most ironically unkillable concept in the world.
* Don't look at me to solve it, you're the one with the legs!
* But... what about that green mushroom in the center?
* Don't just let it take you for a ride. Take control!

LIKE RIVERS!!

name: intro
children: Hello. Before you start your adventure, let me tell you a tale from long ago.

Please, sit down and 
pay attention. 
This story is very important.
(Ahem.)

"Long ago, two races 
ruled over the peaceful Earth: HUMANS and MONSTERS."
"Until on that fateful day, when war had broken out between the two races."
"The fight was gruesome, with friendships broken and many souls lost."
"Few in number and weary from fighting, the MONSTERS surrendered."

"A magic spell sealed 
them under the land they once called home."
"Many years later..."
"MT. EBOTT, 201X."
"Legends on the surface speak of a mountain from which none return."
"Cold and wet, a human child sought shelter there from a rainy day."
"And the rest..."
"... is history."

* I take a donut from the Bakers Eighth's... * It's in the shape of a bee.

name: items.cell_phone.desc
children: * "Cell Phone" - Key Item * Can be used to call people. * Given to me by ASGORE.

name: items.cell_phone.drop1
children: * It doesn't seem like I'm able to drop this item.

name: items.cell_phone.drop2
children: * Sorry, but no. * The five second rule does not apply to phones.

name: items.cell_phone.drop3
children: * The Cell Phone cannot be dropped.

name: items.cell_phone.name
children: Cell Phone

name: items.cell_phone_nothing
children: * (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (...) * (Nothing happens.)

name: items.cell_phone_use
children: * (No signal.)
* (Someone else's cell phone.)
* (A cell phone.) * (It belongs to ASGORE.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (...) * (Someone's picking up...!)
* Gosh, I just hate it when people call me for no reason, y'know?
* I really don't like that kind of thing, y'know?
* This one time, I was trying to eat tuna casserole, y'know?
* But suddenly, someone calls my phone, and it scares off the tuna, y'know?
* H-how am I gonna explain this to my wife, y-y-y'knoooooooowww?!
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (...) * (Someone's picking up...!)

OH, HELLO THERE! 
HOW MAY I HELP YOU??
... WHAT'S THAT??

YOU PRESSED RANDOM 
BUTTONS AND DIALED 
MY NUMBER??

OH, I DO THAT ALL 
THE TIME!!! 
NYEH HEH HEH!!!
* (Click.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (...) * (Someone's picking up...!)
* Howdy, human! * What seems to be the matter?
* ... Huh? You dialed a random number... and called me by accident?
* Ho ho ho! * What a surprise!
* (Click.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (...) * (Someone's picking up...!)
* Hello. This is the hotline to the Royal Navy.
* If you are looking to apply, press 1.
* If you are looking to speak to a member, press 2.
* For other questions, press 3.
* For direct customer service, press 4, or wait after the beep.
* (I pressed 4.)
* One moment please.
* (Spa music.)
* (More Spa music.)
* (Even More Spa music.)
* (Dog Noises.)
* Hello, this is customer service. * How may I help y--
* (I scream loudly.)
* (Click.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (...) * (Someone's picking up...!)
* hello. is your refrigerator running?
* well, then i guess we're chill for now.
* (Click.)
* (W-) * (Was I just... reverse prank called?)
* (I type "707" on the Cell Phone.)
* (I turn the Cell Phone upside down.)
* (Heheh.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (Somehow, I dialed the "Hotline for Idiot Babies.")
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (It sounds like two dynamically compatible monsters are on a ride.)
* Wheeeee!!
* Whoooooo!!
* Whee-whoo?! Quit acting like an ambulance, else you'll need one stat!
* I mean, it coulda been a whee-wham, as in, wham to youse face!
* Maybe... whee-won't have to take it that far.
* Oh, right! We'll give dis phone back to da boss soon, we promise!
* (Click.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (... Spiders are crawling out of it.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* ... * (Someone's picking up...!)
* Hello? Papyrus? That's not another Cell Phone you're calling with, right...?
* Oh! No, you're... a stranger.
* May I ask how you got this number? It should've been private.
* You're just dialing at random?
* Haha, don't you have anything better to do?
* (Click.)
* (I thought I dialed it randomly, but...)
* (Something about the way my fingers moved, typing this number in...)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* (A deep robotic voice plays on the other end.)
* You've reached the voicemail of Admiral Alphys.
* For all things Royal Navy related, please refer to the Royal Navy hotline instead.
* Otherwise, leave a message at this week's transformation call.
* Nyanshin~!
* (I clammed up, and chose to disconnect.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* ... * (Someone's picking up...!)
* Huhuh, you've reached da... uhh, what are we calling ourselves again?
* "The Bumbling Butt!!!"
* And YOU'RE calling yourself that, I'm- anyway, just- just go!
* Okay, uhh, dis is an automade voice message, capiche?
* If youse looking to whack a numbskull's head in, just set up da time and place!
* ... Hey Harry, who's this "numbskull" we's talkin' about?
* Who's the other joe hiding under this table after they stole the boss's only phone?
* .... Ohhhhhhh.
* BOOGIEMEN! Give me back my Sans Receiver THIS INSTANT!
* (Click.)
* (I press random buttons on the Cell Phone.)
* ... * (Someone's picking up...!)
* I don't HAVE a refrigerator! * I threw it out the window!
* And I did so just before you called me, so now your prank doesn't work, HA!
* ... What? Wrong person? * What do you- but he's the only one who calls-...!
* Ugh... Servants, please go retrieve my refrigerator out of the garden.
* (Click.)

name: items.cell_phone_wrong_number_rap
children: * (Before I can press any buttons...)
* Hello! I'm not making the same mistake this time.
* I KNOW you're not the one I'm calling for.
* She's pretty elusive... exactly what I expected from him.
* I wonder if it'll hear me if I perform my...
* Wrong Number spoken rap.
* Numbers get lost in the rabbit's hat.
* Pull out your favorites, what the audience will like.
* The correct combination has all left your sight.
* Hide in the light. Hide in the light.
* Alright.
* (Click...)

* RED HOT!!! I read the Resume with a fiery passion! * It bursts into flames!
* The enemies became BORED, and their ATTACK went down.
* The enemy became BORED, and their ATTACK went down.
* ... Nothing happened.
* I read the Red Hot Resume. * ...
* "Experience with remembering things."

name: md.sewer_chase
children: * AHA! * We meet again, KILLER.
* Do you remember me?
* Because I haven't forgotten about what you've done to me.
* Or what you've done to all those MONSTERS, back there!
* Drawing ASGORE away from you was clearly a mistake.
* All it took was stirring up trouble in the city...
* And he left you all alone.
* Regardless. * Regardless! * REGARDLESS!!!
* I FINALLY HAVE YOU WHERE I WANT YOU!!!
* AHA! * We meet again, BRAT.
* Do you remember me?
* Because I haven't forgotten about what you've done to me.
* Oh, if only ASGORE was here to protect you!
* Ahahaha... I made sure that wouldn't happen.
* All it took was stirring up trouble in the city...
* And he left you ALL ALONE!
* Perfect. * Perfect! * PERFECT!!!
* I FINALLY HAVE YOU WHERE I WANT YOU!!!

name: md.sewer_chase.text0
children: AHAHAHAHA!!

name: md.sewer_chase.text1
children: FUTILE!

name: md.sewer_chase.text2
children: USELESS!

name: md.sewer_chase_begin
children: * WELL. * I... didn't think that through.
* BUT NOW! THERE'S! NOWHERE TO RUN!!
* AHAHAHAHAHA!!!

name: md.sewer_end
children: * No NO NO NO!!! * WHERE ARE YOU GOING?!?!
* This... THIS ISN'T THE LAST YOU'LL SEE OF ME!!
* I WILL FOLLOW YOU TO THE ENDS OF THE EARTH!!!
* I WILL SEARCH EVERY NOOK AND CRANNY!!!
* I WILL REMAIN AWAKE PAST MY CURFEW!!!
* UNTIL I FINALLY HAVE MY REVENGE!!!

name: mettalot_intro
children: * Thank you, dear audience, for coming out to see me!
* But oh, how dreadful! * It seems the show has come to an end!
* No! Mettalot, please stay!
* Ribbit, ribbit! (Mettalot, we love you!)
* Mettalot Is Love Mettalot Is Life
* I know, I know! * You're all so desperate for more!
* Well, have no fear, my wonderful audience!
* Stay tuned for my next show, where I'll...
* (... wait. Is that... a human?!)
* (HERE?! RIGHT NOW?!)
* (I can't stop the show just yet!)
* (Imagine the ratings...)
* (EVERYONE will know my name!)
* My next show, which... I'll have right now, at this very moment!
* After all, how could I pass up such an opportunity...
* ... for my adoring fans!
* Introducing: a surprise guest performer...
* The human!
* Whoa... it's so real!
* How did he get one of those?!
* I LOVE YOU, METTALOT!!!
* (... hey, do I know you from somewhere?)
* (You look... familiar...)
* (Just play along, okay? I need this.)
* Oh, human! How you've fallen so far from the surface...
* And overcome so many obstacles just to make it here!
* Yes, it's obvious to me that you have what it takes...
* ... to be a STAR!
* But oh! How could I forget...
* What's your name, darling?
I think...
* Yes, of course! Best not to keep the audience waiting now!
* Ah, "!" * A cute name for a cute human!
* Now, my wonderful audience...
* Prepare for a unique performance overflowing with drama!
* Action!
* Romance!
* And last but not least...
* Bloodshed!
* "..."
* You hear that, folks? * This is no mere human!
* They've seen the surface, they've descended from above...
* The Angel of prophecy!
* But are they one of Freedom... * Or Death?
* We're about to find out!
* ... "Toby?" * Why, what a name!
* It has style! It has grace!
* Somewhere, from far away, I hear a calling...!
* A calling, for... * Tummy rubs???
* ..."Asgorb?" * You mean, like ASGORE...?
* ... Oh, I see! * It's your stage name, isn't it?
* Not exactly the most original... but it'll do, for the show!
* Oh, human. You can't fool me! I recognize an act when I see one.
* After all, nobody has ever fallen asleep during my performances!
* Repeating "zzz" over and over...
* Why, that's not going to fool anyone!
* Though I suppose I'll play along for now, and call you "."
* Oh, human. You can't fool me! I recognize an act when I see one.
* After all, nobody has ever fallen asleep during my performances!
* Repeating "zzz" over and over...
* Why, that's not going to fool anyone!
* Though I suppose I'll play along for now, and call you "."

* After all, nobody has ever fallen asleep during my performances!
* Repeating "zzz" over and over...
* Why, that's not going to fool anyone!
* Though I suppose I'll play along for now, and call you "."
* Oh, human. You can't fool me! I recognize an act when I see one.
* After all, nobody has ever fallen asleep during my performances!
* Repeating "zzz" over and over...
* Why, that's not going to fool anyone!
* Though I suppose I'll play along for now, and call you "."

* Oh, my! 
* You mustn't let stage fright get to you, dear!
* I understand it may be intimidating, being in my presence...
* Though for the sake of time, I'll call you "."

* Oh, my!

* Ah, "!" * Quite a heroic sound to it, I must say.
* Oh, I'm sure prophecies speak of your good nature!
* Though, the only world for you to save here... is the stage!
* Ah, "!" * Quite a heroic sound to it, I must say.
* Oh, I'm sure prophecies speak of your good nature!
* Though, the only world for you to save here... is the stage!

* ..."Death," you say? * My, how... poetic!
* Though, I must say... this show is far from dying!
* (Nor do you look the "grim reaper" type, my dear.)
* Oh
* Are... are you sure? * "Jerry??"
* Well, that's... not what I expected, admittedly.
* But that's besides the point!
* ..."Papyru?" * I'm sure I've heard a similar name before!
* Well, if this is your way of "phoning in" for a friend...
* I suppose I'll indulge it for the sake of a fan, "Papyru!"
* (Hey, human! Just play along, okay? I need this.)
* Oh, human! How you've fallen so far from the surface...
* And overcome so many obstacles just to make it here!
* Yes, it's obvious to me that you have what it takes...
* ... to be a STAR!
* But oh! How could I forget...
* What's your name, darling?
I think...
* Yes, of course! Best not to keep the audience waiting now!

name: mettalot_outro
children: * Oh, my!
* Even with all my amazing acting and style...
* I've never gotten the crowd THIS riled up!
* They'll be talking about my show for weeks!
* ... No. They'll be talking about OUR show for weeks!
* I couldn't have done this without you, darling.
* Thank you so much!
* As a reward, I want to give you a personal, one-on-one...
* Hangout session with yours truly!
* Oh, everyone is going to be so jealous of you!
* Just stop by my house in Crystal Springs whenever you're there.
* I'll see you there, !
* Just kidding!
* Believe it or not... ghosts are immune to physical attacks!
* But I bet I really sold you on that performance, didn't I?
* I have to thank you for your excellent acting, darling.
* You really sold your part!
* In fact...
* As a reward, I want to give you a personal, one-on-one...
* Hangout session with yours truly!
* Oh, everyone is going to be so jealous of you!
* Just stop by my house in Crystal Springs whenever you're there.
* I'll see you there, !

name: mettalotg_intro
children: * Well, well, well.
* It seems you've been quite the busy little murderer.
* How rude of you, slaughtering my audience like that!
* And here I was under the impression humans WEREN'T freaks.
* Perhaps you're just an exception?
* A rotten egg? * A black sheep?
* Tch... * Well... that's just fine!
* If it's bloodshed you want, darling...
* ... then I, Mettalot, will put on a show you'll NEVER forget!

name: npc.ff
children: * Ribbit, ribbit. * (Greetings, human.)
* (I must thank you for earlier.)
* (Not all humans would be as merciful as you were.)
* ("Always treat others with kindness and compassion.")
* (That's something ASGORE has taught us.)
* Ribbit.
* Ribbit, ribbit. * (Ah, you encountered the Knights?)
* (That makes sense. They're always on the hunt for humans.)
* (As you can imagine, that's something ASGORE isn't happy with.)
* (They're not even real knights! They have no authority whatsoever.)
* (But at least they try to keep the peace around RUINED HOME.)
* (... Emphasis on "try.")
* Ribbit.
* Ribbit, ribbit. * (Hello again, human.)
* (After our earlier conversation, I was reminded...)
* (Do keep an eye out for the Knights, will you?)
* Ribbit.
* Ribbit, ribbit. * (Ah, human. It's you.)
* (No hard feelings about what happened earlier.)
* (I completely understand your surprise.)
* (After all, you couldn't have predicted me jumping towards you.)
* ("Always make sure to put yourself in another person's shoes.")
* (That's something ASGORE has taught us.)
* Ribbit.

name: npc.ruin16c.froggit
children: * Ribbit, ribbit.
* (Well, if it doesn't belong to you...)
* (I'm sure they won't mind if you take some.) * Ribbit.
* Ribbit, ribbit.
* (It looks like someone abandoned their picnic.)
* (Is it yours, perhaps?) * Ribbit.

name: npc.ruins.largeshadow
children: * Perhaps there's someone else, down here...?
* "Lucky Star?" ...Ah, yes, I think I've seen something like that.
* It was floating through the water here, earlier.
* I don't touch the stuff... and I believe that plumber fellow was too busy to notice it.
* Who does that leave...?
* It's always the moss that seals the deal. Always!
* A lot of monsters prefer the city, but there's TONS of benefits to this dank sewer!
* For one thing: TOTAL peace and quiet. Plus, everyone knows each other!
* But the best part? * All-you-can-eat moss!

name: npc.ruins.monster
children: * ... Huh?? "Lucky star?"
* Actually, now that you mention it...
* Something like that washed down here!
* I thought it was neat, but if it belongs to someone else...
* (I got the Lucky Star.)
* I'm sorry for the trouble!
* T-the noises are gone??
* I think s-something really bad happened over there!
* D-do you hear those noises from ahead?
* I think it m-might be a sewer monster!
* ... Huh?? * You want to GO that way?
* I guess you can if you want...
* B-but don't tell the monster that I'm here!

name: npc.ruins.plumber
children: * Oh hey, it worked? Sani-tacular!
* ... Just, uh, let me know when you wanna use it again.
Yes
No
* Doo dee doo, da-dabadee-doh...
* Oh! Well, howdy there. * I'm just working on this transporter pipe.
* (With how much this place is falling apart, a quick exit is good to have.)
* ... * What's that look for?
* Anyhow! You wanna give it a test drive?
* It'll take you straight to the ladder by the city.
Yes
No
* You sure? You don't look like you want to...
Yes
NO!!!
* Al-riiight! Hop on in, kid!
* Al-riiight! Hop on in, kid!

name: npc.ruins.smallshadow
children: * Anyways, keep looking around. I'm sure you'll find it.
* "Lucky Star?" * I haven't seen one of those around...
* Although, I think someone down here likes collecting little trinkets that wash up.
* Something about one's treasure being another's trash, or something...?
* What? You're saying it's possessed and was chasing after you?
* ... Pssht. Typical ghost story.
* Sometimes, as a sewer-dweller, you see the strangest things.
* I just saw a training dummy fly through the air!
* Someone must've tossed it over the bridge, and the air caught it just right.

name: phone.asg_after
children: * (Dialing...)
* No answer. * Perhaps he's taking a nap.

name: phone.asg_city
children: * (Ring, ring...)
* Howdy, human!
* At this point, I'm sure you're exploring The City of Old.
* Now, don't go rushing ahead to meet me. * Take your time!
* There's a lot to explore, and so many monsters to talk to!
* Plus, you may learn something new through repeat conversation.
* Just make sure you save room in your pockets!
* Who knows what little trinkets you'll find?
* (Click.)

name: phone.asg_eg
children: * (Ring, ring...)
* Howdy again, human!
* I'm calling because, erhm...
* There MIGHT be some slight complications with your treat.
* Nothing too drastic to worry about, however!
* I'm sure you will still enjoy it after today's journey.
* Now, where would you happen to be, if I may ask?
* ... Ah! You've finished the puzzle gauntlet!
* Ahead lies a bridge that leads to The City of Old.
* It crosses over the sewers and water canals of RUINED HOME.
* Now, while it may be a tad bit rickety, there's nothing to fear.
* I always make sure that bridge is tended to and maintained.
* I will see you ahead.
* (Click.)

name: phone.asg_in_house
children: * (Dialing...)
* Howdy!
* I'm not sure why you called me, since I'm in the living room.
* Feel free to take a seat on the couch if you'd like!
* (Click...)
* I'm not sure why you called me, since I'm in the kitchen.
* Feel free to take a seat on the couch if you'd like!
* (Click...)

name: phone.asg_killed
children: * (Dialing...)
* . . . * Nothing but silence.

name: phone.asg_mg
children: * (Ring, ring...)
* Howdy! I hope that RUINED HOME isn't giving you much trouble.
* ... Ah, really?
* My, I'm quite impressed!
* After all, you've reached the puzzle gauntlet's midpoint.
* I am very impressed with you, young one.
* Now, this brings me to what I wished to call you for.
* I have quelled the panic amongst the city residents.
* And since I have more time to myself, I wondered...
* How about a little treat to commemorate today's events?
* Now, I won't say WHAT this treat will be, but...
* Do you prefer cinnamon or butterscotch?
Cinnamon
Bscotch
* Wonderful! In that case, I will-
* Hm. Now, what am I forgetting...?
* ... Oh, yes! Is there anything you're allergic to, human?
* Ah, I see. * I just wanted to make sure.
* (Click.)
* Would you happen to prefer cinnamon?
Yes
No
* Ho ho ho! * My suspicions are confirmed.
* It's quite odd. * Whenever a human has fallen...
* I have the strangest sense of deja vu...
* Almost as if I know them already.
* Perhaps... I'm just being reminded of someone from the past...
* ...or perhaps it's just my old age getting the better of me.
* But, thank you for being so patient.
* Hm. Now, what am I forgetting...?
* ... Oh, yes! Is there anything you're allergic to, human?
* Ah, I see. * I just wanted to make sure.
* (Click.)
* Would you happen to prefer butterscotch?
Yes
No
* Ho ho ho! * My suspicions are confirmed.

name: phone.asg_refuse_answer
children: * (Dialing...)
* No answer.

name: phone.asg_same_room
children: * There's no need to call him. * He's sitting right there.
* There's no need to call him. * He's standing right there.

name: phone.asg_wait
children: * (Ring, ring...)
* (Click.)
* Oh, thank goodness! * There you are, young one!
* The most peculiar thing just happened to me...
* I was talking to you, when suddenly, my CELL PHONE was stolen!
* Unfortunately, I lost track of the thief. * But...
* After some searching, I came across a... nest, of sorts.
* I... don't want to talk about it.
* Put some pep in your step. ;)
* (...) * (I hear a distant voice.)
* Hello...? Are you out there?
* Please, I'm not upset with you! I just want my CELL PHONE back.
* You don't need to hide...
* (...) * (It sounds like somebody running away.)
* Now, now! There's no need to run!
* If you need to borrow my phone, you can just ask!
* ... * T-there, thank you for stopping... (pant, pant)
* Now, if you could just return my-
* (ZOOM!)
* N-no, come back!
* Golly, I'm not prepared for this workout...!
* ASGORE here!
* There's been no more signs of that training dummy around the CITY.
* Perhaps they left...?
* With any luck, they shouldn't be an issue.
* Just make sure you-
* (SNATCH!)
* H-hey! You! * What are you doing?!
* Come back here with my CELL PHONE, please!
* Howdy! This is ASGORE, again.
* I reached the CITY, and I'm currently talking with its residents.
* From what they've said, it appears the one who caused such a fuss...
* Was actually that training dummy, from before!
* (Sigh...) * I do hope they cause no more trouble for you.
* They're already on my "naughty list" for this!
* Howdy! This is ASGORE.
* I'm terribly sorry for taking so long! * You see...
* On my way, I may have... gotten confused with a puzzle solution.
* If, by chance, you're still in that hallway...
* You may wish to go ahead, as I will take a while.
* Don't you worry! * Sooner or later, we're bound to cross paths.
* Until then!

name: phone.asg_wait_endtrigger
children: * (Ring, ring...)
* ASGORE here!
* I apologize if you were unable to contact me.
* The most peculiar thing just happened to me...
* I was talking to you, when suddenly, my CELL PHONE was stolen!
* Unfortunately, I lost track of the thief. * But...
* Now that I have retrieved it, you may call me again.
* (Click.)

name: phone.asg_wait_interfere
children: * (Dialing...)
* (There's some kind of interference.)

name: phone.c0_e0
children: * (Dialing...)
* Remember, young one.
* I am quite busy, so please only call for pressing matters.
* (Click...)
* Do you need anything, child?
* ... Ah, just wanted to say hello again?
* You sure are determined to keep greeting me.
* I would love to talk more, but I DO have things I must be doing.
* If you have any pressing matters, please call me again.
* Why, hello again!
* My, you sure are calling quite a lot, aren't you?
* ... Ah! * I see what the problem is.
* Silly me, leaving you alone without much to preoccupy you.
* Well, if you grow bored with the JOURNAL...
* There is something else you have...
* Your imagination!
* Picture yourself as the leader of a flowery kingdom...
* Having tea parties and giving jolly speeches!
* I bet that would be fun.
* Howdy! I hope that RUINED HOME isn't giving you trouble.
* I know that in the past, other children have-
* ... I'm sure you will be fine.
* I have complete faith in you, young one.
* Howdy! And how are you faring, child?
* Ah, good, good.
* I'm very glad to hear.
* (Dialing...)

name: phone.c0_e1
children: * (Dialing...)
* Howdy!
* ... Ah, about me?
* Well, there isn't much to say about myself.
* I'm just an old man who likes to spend his time relaxing.
* Taking care of the flowers, telling stories...
* Enjoying cups of tea, holding conversation with the locals...
* Why, even sharing useful life advice with others!
* It is quite rewarding.
* (Click...)

name: phone.c0_e10
children: * (Dialing...)
* Did... you just say...
* That training dummy... chased you through the sewers?
* ... I'm terribly sorry for leaving you on your own, child.
* Once you reach my home, I promise you...
* I will make up for everything that has happened today.
* (Click...)

name: phone.c0_e2
children: * (Dialing...)
* ... Pardon?
* For a second, I could have sworn you called me "Dad."
* ... Oh, you did?
* Nobody has called me that in a long time...
* I... guess if you would be comfortable calling me that, then you may.
* (Click...)

name: phone.c0_e3
children: * (Dialing...)
* Now, I know I gave you permission to call me "Dad."
* And, of course, what you... just said, is perfectly within reason!
* But... why did you say it like that, young one?
* What made you say that???
* I don't know whether to laugh or... feel disturbed.
* (Click...)
* ... Oh, dear. Are you alright, young one?
* You really do not seem sure of yourself.
* Plus... you could do much better than a kooky old man like me.
* You have your whole life ahead of you!
* Ermh... did... did I hear that correctly?
* Golly, that's adorable! * Though... I am far too old for you, child.
* Perhaps one day, you may find a "special someone" your age!
* Though... you did not seem very sure of yourself, there.
* It is best not to force feelings, young one.

name: phone.c0_e4
children: * (Dialing...)
* Oh ho ho! Help with a puzzle?
* Now, let's see...
* Now, now. I am quite busy right now, little one.
* When there is a puzzle, I shall give you a hint...
* ... but please, only when there is a puzzle.
* (Click...)
* Oh, human! * That isn't a puzzle, either.
* Ho ho, I do enjoy a good jape now and again.
* But please, call in case you get stuck on a puzzle.
* Alright?
* ... Wait a moment. * What you're describing...
* Oh, silly child! * That isn't a puzzle room!
* Unless you consider the mystery of life to be a puzzle, hoho!
* Ah... quite a difficult puzzle, indeed.
* My advice would be to observe your surroundings.
* Take note of certain shapes, and changes to the rooms...
* I'm sure you can do this!
* Remember, human. * If you keep having trouble...
* The third time's the charm!
* ... Well, only one contestant may come in first, correct?
* Think about that!
* You haven't ordered the rocks around, have you?
* They're already in order, so there's no need to do that!
* Look where they're placed, though...
* Do you see the colors of the switches, young one?
* Perhaps they correspond to certain flowers...
* Ah, this is a tricky one.
* I must admit, I tend to have trouble with it!
* If the leaves are meant to catch your fall...
* How come there are spots without any?
* Oh, this should be an easy one!
* It's less of a puzzle, and more of a lesson.
* What comes down must come up!
* Hm... that pirate sure is a crafty fellow!
* Firstly: all switches must be flipped.
* Look for key words which indicate the order...
* And remember to try flipping your perspective!
* Hm... perhaps there is a solution to this riddle?
* An order of the switches, even?
* Look for any keywords that may indicate a sequence!
* Well, this should be easy!
* Simply push the rocks onto the pressure plates.
* Then, you shall succeed!
* Oh? * There are vines covering the hints?
* My sincerest apologies, young one.
* To make it up for you...
* Start with the bottom left switch, and move diagonally.
* At the end, be sure to stop with the bottom right switch!
* ... Hm? There are rocks on the switches...?
* Well, then! * At least that should make things easier.
* I would highly recommend reflecting on this matter.
* And do remember to take the right path!
* Golly, what lovely flowers!
* Perhaps you should inspect them closer...
* And in a particular order, too!
* Do you see all of the pillars, young one?
* They're all in such good shape! * Except for one...
* I wonder why that must be...?
* I would recommend inspecting it.

name: phone.c0_e5
children: * (Dialing...)
* My, have I really gained that much weight over the years?
* ... Perhaps I should consider more dietary options.
* (Click...)

name: phone.c0_e6
children: * (Dialing...)
* Oh, goodness! * The Knights attacked you?
* I'm... terribly sorry, human.
* I shouldn't have left you by yourself.
* A-are you okay? * How did you fare against...
* O-oh. That... erm...
* A-ah! I must attend to something. * Forgive me.
* (Click...)
* ... Oh! * You were able to talk things out?
* Why, that's a relief! * However...
* I will have a stern talking-to with them later.
* After all, you haven't hurt a fly!
* ... have you?
* (Click...)

name: phone.c0_e7
children: * (Dialing...)
* Those hooligans?! * Again?!
* ... Well, that settles it.
* It seems I must pay Aaxel's mother yet another visit.
* At least she enjoys my tea...
* (Click...)

name: phone.c0_e9
children: * (Dialing...)
* Mettalot brought you onto his show? * How wonderful!
* You know, I remember when he first started out.
* He was so nervous... but his passion shined through all the same.
* I wanted him to feel happy being who he wanted to be.
* So, I decided to surprise him with those gloves and bow!
* Ever since, this city has felt a little more alive, with him around.
* (Click...)

name: rh_MMM_flavor
children: * Moldsmal and its cohorts jiggle from side to side.

name: rh_MM_flavor
children: * Moldsmal and its cohort jiggle from side to side.

name: rh_M_flavor
children: * Moldsmal wriggles about curiously.

name: rh_b_flavor
children: * Butchy looks to see if her girlfriend is watching.

name: rh_f_flavor
children: * Smells like mustard seed.

name: rh_fw_flavor
children: * Smells like mustard seed and anxiety.

name: rh_in.M
children: * I've tripped over a Moldsmal.

name: rh_in.MM
children: * The scent of limes hits me like a bus. * It's a couple of Moldsmal.

name: rh_in.MMM
children: * A line of Moldsmal block my way!

name: rh_in.b
children: * Butchy skids to a stop, looking incredibly cool as she does so.

name: rh_in.b2
children: * Butchy zooms into battle!

name: rh_in.b3
children: * Butchy approaches at high speed!

name: rh_in.f
children: * Froggit hopped close!

name: rh_in.f2
children: * Froggit hops up close.

name: rh_in.ff
children: * A pair of Froggits hop towards me.

name: rh_in.ff2
children: * Froggit hops up close, followed by its cohort.

name: rh_in.fw
children: * Froggit approaches. * Whimsun is... also there.

name: rh_in.fw2
children: * Froggit and Whimsun drew near!

name: rh_in.l
children: * Loox stomps towards me, chuckling.

name: rh_in.l2
children: * Loox drew near!

name: rh_in.l3
children: * Loox stomps near with an arrogant atmosphere.

name: rh_in.lf
children: * Loox and its cohort drew near!

name: rh_in.lf2
children: * Loox drew near, with Froggit hopping close behind.

name: rh_in.ll
children: * A pair of Loox decided to pick on me!

name: rh_in.ll2
children: * Loox and its cohort draw near!

name: rh_in.ll3
children: * Loox and its cohort charge forward!

name: rh_in.lm
children: * Loox grins menacingly, waving over to Migosp.

name: rh_in.lvm
children: * Loox and co. decided to pick on me!

name: rh_in.s
children: * Syrose has noticed me.

name: rh_in.s2
children: * Syrose struts towards me!

name: rh_in.sM
children: * I've caught the attention of Syrose and Moldsmal.

name: rh_in.sw
children: * Syrose stops me in my tracks. * Is that a Whimsun behind her?

name: rh_in.v
children: * Vegetoid sprung up from the ground!

name: rh_in.v2
children: * Vegetoid sprung forth!

name: rh_in.v3
children: * Vegetoid drew near!

name: rh_in.vl
children: * Vegetoid and Loox attacked!

name: rh_in.vs
children: * Vegetoid and Syrose noticed me!

name: rh_in.w
children: * Whimsun approached meekly!

name: rh_in.w2
children: * Whimsun quietly flutters up to me.

name: rh_l_flavor
children: * Loox is checking to see if his horns are still sharp.

name: rh_lf_flavor
children: * Froggit hops to and fro, while Loox gnashes its teeth.

name: rh_ll_flavor
children: * Loox checks if its horns are still sharp. * Its cohort nods in response.

name: rh_lm_flavor
children: * Migosp whispers to Loox, causing them both to chuckle.

name: rh_sM_flavor
children: * Syrose swivels her stem, and Moldsmal jiggles from side to side.

name: rh_s_flavor
children: * Syrose tries to hand me a slip of paper. * Is this... a phone number?

name: rh_sw_flavor
children: * Syrose tries to gossip with Whimsun, but it flutters away in fear.

name: rh_v_flavor
children: * Vegetoid cackles to itself.

name: rh_vs_flavor
children: * Smells like a greenhouse.

name: rh_w_flavor
children: * Whimsun has the confidence of a melting ice cube.

name: ruinc.int.armbird
children: * My sister, though, she's not as fond of other people, y'know.
* She's more of an introverted type, y'know.
* That doesn't mean she's not FAMILY, though, y'know?
* I just love it here in the park, y'know?
* It's nice to get some fresh air, get outside and such, y'know?
* Plus you might get to meet someone new, y'know.
* Just like right now, y'know!

name: ruinc.int.bandit
children: * Kid. I can't do Crimes, if you're Watching me.
* He He He... I'm gonna commit some
* Crimes

name: ruinc.int.bench
children: Yes
No
Yes
No

name: ruinc.int.biglegbird
children: * Quiche Kilt-...huh? Oh, yeah, I've been lifting some heavy stuff with these legs.
* How could you tell?
* Hey, isn't that guy over there supposed to be at that fast food place, right now?
* Aw man, that poor delivery boy... whatever his name was.
* Hot Dog Shorts? * Panini Pantaloons?

name: ruinc.int.blocktheway
children: * Boy do I Love   blocking the Way.

name: ruinc.int.blueslime
children: * I've sent the kids and my father inside.
* Something just... came over me.
* It feels as if we've all lost something very dear to us.
* Don't let your best days slip by you, child. Try new things!
* Or, perhaps, try old things with new twists!
* For instance, I used some lemon-scented mustache oil this morning...
* I got a few compliments from my coworkers!
* What a pleasant day it is. Reminds me of my youth!
* Such wondrous days, they were. Everything seemed so new, and exciting!

name: ruinc.int.bridge_warning
children: * Felt monsters fleeing in the rooms behind me.

name: ruinc.int.bubbleboy
children: * blblblblblblblblbl... blblblb!
* blblblblblblblb

name: ruinc.int.burgertrash
children: Yes
No
* I'm carrying too many items to take it.
* ... I got the Grillburger.
* It's empty.
* Well, let's see here...
* There's a burger in this trash can!
Yes
No
* I'm carrying too many items to take it.
* Well... I got the Grillburger.
* It's empty now.
* No more garbage-dwelling for me, it seems.

name: ruinc.int.butchy
children: * ... well, I guess I fear my girlfriend getting mad at me.
* But that's it! Nothing else!
* I'm so cool. Or at least, I like to think I am.
* I zoom so fast, and fear NOTHING!

name: ruinc.int.butchy2
children: * Everything's too SLOW around here!
* Once I grow up, I'm gonna make it BIG and FAST!
* This place used to be the ROYAL FAMILY'S private grounds...
* But after a while, it became a spare town for the calmer monsters here.
* Man... talk about BOOR-IINGG!

name: ruinc.int.conblock
children: * Hey! Youse there! Don't even think about sneakin' past me!
* Some ragin' ragdoll stormed in and made a real mess.
* I'm not gonna let you muck it up more, so beat it!
* Didn't cha hear what I just said?!
* There ain't nothin' to see here.
* ... except cotton. * Lots and lots of cotton.

name: ruinc.int.connotblock
children: * You doing okay, there? Did somethin' happen?
* Well, hey... whatever it is, I'm sure ASGORE will help you fix it.
* He tends to do that.
* Yeeesh... finally got most of dat rubble all cleaned up.
* Though, I'm tellin' ya, kid...
* Tomorrow, somethin's just gonna go and collapse out of nowhere!
* In this old bunch-a-bricks, a worker's job ain't never done!
* Don'tcha touch anything, kid!
* The last thing I need is another wall fallin' down, capiche?!

name: ruinc.int.delinquent
children: * (Mutter, mutter...)
* I wonder if he'd like a card...
* "I'm sorry for vandalizing public property." * "I won't do it again."
* And then I'll paint a GIANT mural for him...!
* (Grumble, grumble...)
* Stupid Greasers and their... stupid DARE...
* Stupid... stupid...! ME!
* ASGORE always supported my art...
* I gotta make this up to him...

name: ruinc.int.dirsign1
children: * "North: Capital Building" * "West: Bridge"

name: ruinc.int.dirsign2
children: * "North: Royal Village" * "South: Town Square"

name: ruinc.int.dirtarea
children: * "Tree growth in progress. Please do not trample."
"- ASGORE"

name: ruinc.int.dog
children: * ... Though, this dog shouldn't wear itself thin.
* I'm sure it's appreciated by a lot of people, who wouldn't want to see it hurt.
* There's a small, white dog sleeping here. * Its paw looks cramped...
* I hope it heals soon, so it can get back to doing dog things.
* ... like sleeping, but more comfortably.

name: ruinc.int.door
children: * ... Oh, hello there.
* Are you trying to get inside this building?
* Why's that? * Hoping to poke around?
* Maybe take a thing or two?
* Well, if that's the case, then BUZZ OFF!!!
* ... O-oh, you weren't going to do that?
* I'm terribly sorry.
* Though, you couldn't get into this place anyways.
* I'm a~all locked up~...!

name: ruinc.int.door_0
children: * It's locked.

name: ruinc.int.door_1
children: * I jiggle the doorknob to no avail. It's locked.

name: ruinc.int.door_2
children: * As it turns out, this door is locked.

name: ruinc.int.door_3
children: * Locked... * How disappointing.

name: ruinc.int.door_4
children: * It's locked. I wonder what secrets lie beyond it...
* ... a well-furnished living room, perhaps?

name: ruinc.int.door_g
children: * Locked.

name: ruinc.int.drumandcymbal
children: * Yea-haha! We STILL got it!
* You really think so?! Whew, I thought I was getting a little rusty.
* Whaddya mean? You're nickel-plated!
* We used to have jobs working for this comedian, but we got laid off.
* Luckily, Mettalot was happy to employ us!
* He gave us a chance when nobody else would!
* In other words, we had...
* ... a GHOST of a chance!

name: ruinc.int.eyeballmail
children: * I'm almost finished with my route!
* Last package is for someone named "ASGORE DREEMURR..."
* Oh hey, I know that guy! I wonder how he's doing.
* At least this city's easy to navigate!
* I heard it used to be an awkward labyrinth to move around in.
* Aw, man, I really hope I'm getting everyone's mail right...
* It's my first day on the job, and I want to start my career off on a high note!
* I hear if you get good enough, you get to deliver messages to the queen herself!
* ... Although, apparently she never reads them.

name: ruinc.int.flowerguy
children: * ... (Perhaps this monster would rather be left alone.)
* (The monster stares at the flowers below.) * (Menacingly.)

name: ruinc.int.flowerking.aaxel
children: * You... you watered the plant? ; )
* The one I kept forgetting to? ; )
* ... Thanks. ; )
* If you don't leave me alone, I'll...
* I'll call... ASGORE! ; )
* A-and then YOU'LL be doing community service, too! ; )
* No, I don't feel bad about my actions! ; )
* No, I'm not lying to look cool! ; )
* No, I'm not telling ASGORE I'm sorry and having tea with him... AGAIN...! ; )
* Just get OUT of here already! ; )
* ... W-what do YOU want? ; )
* Come to b-beat me up again? ; )
* Well, uh... I'm BUSY right now! With my JOB! ; )

Yes

name: ruinedknights_intro
children: * So the human finally shows their face...!
What's the matter, human? Are you surprised...!?
...You look like you've seen a ghost.
Aha~! A handsome ghost, perhaps~?
I've seen one of those, too~!
Regardless...! There's nowhere left to run, nor hide!
For we are the purveyors of righteousness...!
...We are the strong and mighty.
Aha~! We are the embodiment of glory~!

We are...!  
 ...We are...  
 Aha~! We are~...!
* The RUINED KNIGHTS!
How DARE you show your face down here...!
Ever since the WAR...!
Aha~! As time has grown, so has the sadness~!
A prison of earth, a prison of time~!
...We've been waiting for the day we walk free.
Quite right, my comrades...!

And so now...!  
 ...Now...  
 Aha~! Now~...!
* We shall DO BATTLE!
Engarde, fiend...!
Your rampage hasn't gone unnoticed, you brute...!
Aha~! Most dreadful, most disgusting~!
A slaughter most senseless, and quite silly too~!
...We refuse to let you go any further.
Quite right, my comrades...!

And so now...!  
 ...Now...  
 Aha~! Now~...!
* We shall DO BATTLE!
Aha~! What a turn of events~!
The fabled human, in their flesh~!
...Typically, humans DO have flesh.
Regardless...! There's nowhere left to hide, you fleshy foe...!
For we are the purveyors of righteousness...!
...We are the strong and mighty.
Aha~! We are the embodiment of glory~!

We are...!  
 ...We are...  
 Aha~! We are~...!
* The RUINED KNIGHTS!
What's the matter, human? Are you surprised...?!
Surely, you expected to encounter...
* The RUINED KNIGHTS!
Engarde, fiend...!

name: ruinedknights_outro
children: Thank you, human...!
You've helped us all realize something about ourselves...!
...I can be myself, and my friends will accept me.
Aha~! My hubris shall blind me~!
My eyes are too beautiful for that~!
...Heh, some things never change, I guess.
...Let's get going, guys.

name: shop.bee.talk_aboutyou
children: * Aw, don't look so down, now! * Where's that sweet smile at?
* The name is Bertha Bloom of the Bloom colony! * But you can call me Betty.
* I hail from the bee-autiful Sunnedout Gorge -- culinary hotspot of the Underground, and home of THE Campfire!
* It's also known for its education and colleges. * Not to fluff my own fuzz, but I was Flower Queen and running for years...
* ... That is, 'till that prissy BROAD and her pretty 'lil eyes snatched it from under my wings...
* But life goes on, don't it? * When we're all trapped under a mountain, we gotta get something else to fixate on.

name: shop.bee.talk_festival
children: * It won't be long now 'till we're free, so keep buzzing, busy bee!
* Queen TORIEL... * She's had a rough go at it, THAT'S for sure.

* She's a very motherly figure at heart, and her actions show it. 
* Education is important down here!
* If she wasn't the Queen, she'd probably be a teacher. * She loves kids like you!
* People have their doubts, but I'm a firm believer that under her rule, we'll one day see the sun again.
* The Crown Jewel is our village's honeysuckle! * The cherry on top, the main tourist attraction!
* It may not seem like it's much... but it's been around longer than you and I have, that's for sure.
* The real royal treatment always kept it feeling good as new. * Refurbishments, new paint jobs, and new parts... for years and years.
* It was built in honor of our Queen TORIEL! * It's been around for years and kept strong, just like her.
* You'd think with the Queen's emphasis on education, you kids would know this stuff.
* But, if you're not a local... I can't really blame you.
* Here's the buzz.
* The Guiding Light festival is an ancient celebration 'round here -- but with all the flashiness, the original meaning was lost to time.
* If memory serves, the modern interpretation is something like...
* "As we were sealed below, the stars obstructed and the light taken away, the crystals shined on to guide our way."
* "They are our Guiding Light."

name: shop.bee.talk_village
children: * I've never met him myself, but he sends his goons here to pick up large orders.
* It's never the same people, and they always try to make a dramatic entrance... * ... Through the windows.
* What, are they trying to... scare me? That's funny.

* They call him "Count Koffin-K." 
* He's a lunatic who lives in a manor west of the village.
* He isn't a real threat, ain't nobody scared of him or his flunkies.
* Still, don't go near him, even if he's harmless. * You might genuinely be annoyed to death.
* The only pain that lonely loser brings is the Navy having to clean up banana peels and toilet paper.
* Admiral Alphys has made ATTEMPTS to bring that guy down, but he always gives them the slip.
* I bet he has one HELL of a lawyer.

* They call him "Count Koffin-K." 
* He's a lunatic who lives in a manor west of the village.
* He isn't a real threat, ain't nobody scared of him or his flunkies.
* Still, don't go near him, even if he's harmless. * You might genuinely be annoyed to death.
* The only pain that lonely loser brings is the Navy having to clean up banana peels and toilet paper.
* Admiral Alphys has made ATTEMPTS to bring that guy down, but he always gives them the slip.
* I bet he has one HELL of a lawyer.
* Look around you, he's the (second) main selling point of the Starlight Isles!
* A skeletal hunk of a man, his middle name is danger.
* Swooping in to save the day, signing bootleg figures of himself, always giving to our local community...
* ... And teaching that batty CREEP what for.
* The Navy Scouts? The troops who protect us? * ... Seriously, where are you from?
* And, well, I SAY protect us... but if you ask me, those dogs bark up the wrong tree sometimes.
* If we're talking REAL protection, then our very own vigilante celebrity is where it's at!
* Starstruck Village, huh? * Let's see how I remember my history...
* ... Yes, yes.
* So when monsters expanded out of Ruined Home, they were "STARSTRUCK" by the crystals on the cavern ceiling. Looks like a bunch of stars, huh?
* Well, folks were enthralled by them so much that they set up camp. It started out small, but soon more and more monsters showed up.
* Then came the buildings... we have tons to see here besides the festival stands!
* The Bed & Bunny is great for catchin' z's and eats, there's the library that does bingo... the Star Cinema, the beach...
* And it's all under the "WATCHFUL" eyes of our Navy Scouts!

name: shop.bee.talk_yourshop
children: * I appreciate the chit-chat, sugar. But unlike this honey, I'm gonna expire if I gotta think of more shop-related trivia!
* You wanna know about the shop? * Certainly!
* Well, it must have been... a few years ago, yes, when my colony migrated from Sunnedout.
* We set up shop here in the village. I did all the decor myself! It's cute, I know.
* Let's see, what else...? * Umm...
* Oh, yes! It's a family-owned trade, "Bloomin' Buzz!"
* Set up in the heart of the Starlight Isles, so tourists like you can enjoy local and AUTHENTIC honey, honey.
* What part of the Underground do you hail from, anyways?

* I'm trying to be nice here: either buy something, or skedaddle.
* Uh, kid? This is a burger joint, in case you didn't notice. * You can't sell stuff here.
* And no offense, but I don't want anything you're offering.

children: About ASGORE

name: shop.bugerpant.talk_aboutgreasers
children: * ... She'll love me for who I am, huh?
* Heh...
* Thanks, little buddy. I'll... keep that in mind.
* Now, why don't you buy something already?

* . 
* Little buddy uh that's not uh 
* how it works???
* (oh god how do i explain this to the kid) * . . .
* SO! Love is... complicated.
* Trust me, I've tried it before! With numerous chicks! BABES! * And it's never really... worked out???
* And with Flara, she's... a really good friend to me, y'know? * I don't want to ruin that.
* Oh, Flara? The waitress? * Well, she's. Heh...
* She's great, little buddy. She's really great. * No matter what, she always listens to me, and...
* She cares. She honestly, genuinely cares about my problems, and about my career.
* If there's one good thing that came out of this job... it's her.
* The freaking GREASERS. Of COURSE. * Please, little buddy. Don't grow up to be like them.
* They're CONSTANTLY screwing with me! * Throwing burgers at me, prank calling me, threatening to beat me up...
* And ALL because that meathead, Aaxel, has the hots for Flara.
* Heh. No wonder he doesn't have a girlfriend.
* That tends to happen when you INTIMIDATE AND THREATEN PEOPLE TO GET WHAT YOU WANT!!!

name: shop.bugerpant.talk_aboutname
children: * ... * Ugh... I hate this part. * (Sigh...) Here we go.
* Hello! I am contractually obliged to tell you that my name is "Bugerpant." * As you can see, it says so on my nametag.
* Please make sure to stop by Grillby's Backyard Barbecue for a tasty treat, and bring a friend!
* . . . * NOW THAT'S OUT OF THE WAY!
* Little buddy. Please, don't make me repeat all of that again.
* The whole thing is a story for another day.
* As much as I absolutely HATE it, just call me Bugerpant. * Please.

name: shop.bugerpant.talk_aboutyou
children: * OH! Heh, yeah! * I've actually been working on my own self-written musical.
* It's kind of ambitious, yeah. And while I want to keep it hush-hush until it's all done...
* ... Eh, what the heck. * Want to be the first to buy a copy of my script? Let me know!
* So he's taking volunteers for one of his shows, and just my luck, he PICKS ME!!!
* He asks for my name, I... FOLLOW THE COMPANY POLICY... and you know what?
* HE INSTANTLY FORGETS MY NAME!!! Calls me "BURGER BOY!" * FOR YOUR INFORMATION, METTALOT, IT'S "BUGERPANT!!!" * I'M BUGERPANT!!!!!
* . . . * A-anyways. The guy leads me to believe he's going to take me under his wing, but you know what he does?
* Asks me to get him some food. * Claims I'll be "playing the role of the delivery boy."
* Heh... I guess stardom really gets to you, huh? So much for THAT opportunity...
* (Sigh...) Maybe someone else will read my script...
* Let me give you some advice, little buddy: NEVER TRUST POPULAR PEOPLE.
* See, I'd heard of Mettalot before I came to Ruined Home.
* He's pretty obscure. Does some performances here and there, people occasionally chit-chat about him.
* But here? He's a freaking SUPERSTAR. Monsters WORSHIP him.
* I'd been to some of his shows, and he's got SOME talent, I'll give him that.
* I started to idolize him, and wanted to impress him. * I thought it'd finally be my chance to follow my dreams...
* MAN, WAS THAT A WASTE OF TIME!!!
* SO! This job? NOT my future plans! * I'm sure you could tell, but I want to be an ACTOR!
* I thought being a delivery boy could help me get there. * Y'know, meet people, see some new faces.
* Maybe along the way, I'd find an agent who'd help my career take off.
* There WAS Mettalot, but... he turned out to be a sham.
* And so now, my chances of success? * NOTHING!!!
* Man, you'd think that a massive restaurant chain like Grillby's would have more than a single delivery boy in the ENTIRE UNDERGROUND, right?
* Heh, heh... * WRONG!!!
* I work myself EXHAUSTED every. Single. Day.
* And do I get benefits? Do I get health care? DO I EVEN GET A SINGLE MOMENT OF RECOGNITION? * NOT A CHANCE!!!
* And if that isn't enough, I'm stuck working the counter whenever the frycook takes one of his NAP BREAKS.
* So much for my career...
* Nothing much to say about me, really. * I'm just a man on a mission.
* ... Unfortunately, that mission isn't going as planned.
* I really want to do more with my life, but instead I'm stuck working for the corporate machine so I can follow my dreams.
* And let me tell you, little buddy: this job SUCKS!!

name: shop.bugerpant.talk_first
children: * Oh, heh. I appreciate it, but I've got a tight schedule.
* That tends to happen when you have my kind of responsibilities.
* (Sigh...) * Alright, little buddy. I'll bite.
* What's up?

name: shop.bugerpant.talk_ruinedhome
children: * ASGORE, huh? * Man, that guy... he's like a big, friendly dad to everyone around here.
* He's not the mayor or anything, but he's always helping people out. Sponsoring town events, donating to needy monsters...
* This one time, he even invited me over for tea when he saw I wasn't doing too great. * Even though this isn't my home.
* We talked for a while about life, our passions... and he was really supportive of me.
* Though, from what I gather, he's got a TROUBLED past.
* I dunno the details, but... please be gentle with him, kid. * He's a big old softy who just needs some love.
* You know why some people say this place is called "Ruined Home"?
* I can't remember the joke, but it's something like, "It got too old to be called Old Home."
* As for the place itself, I guess it's nice... for an ancient city about to FALL APART.
* Seriously, take it from me, kid. Just the other day, a part of the road cracked, and I nearly fell into the sewer.
* At least ASGORE and some others are trying to hold everything together... in more ways than one.

name: shop.muffet.talk_about
children: * I'm getting ready to enter the Spider Bakery and its Scouts into phase 2~
* The SOUL Puff will be a good draw-in, but... it needs more.
* I'd like to target a more folksy appeal, more about conversation than solicitation~
* Well, the solicitation will immediately come after, but you know what I mean~
* It's all about emphasizing that spidery side of spiders~
* One thing's for sure, while making pastries is a good way to earn gold...
* Making lots of friends seems an even better one~
* It's my bakery. For baking things.
* By the way, I wasn't sure if you noticed...
* But that exit behind you looks rather far away from where I'm standing~
* ... You still don't know what this place is, do you?
* I see~ Nobody bothered filling you in, so now it's my job to do so...
* You're standing in the Spider Bakery~ A name familiar to everyone who's not clueless~
* Our motto is "Your satisfaction comes first, but your gold comes close~"
* That being said... it is my domain, and there is no one motto around here.
* For example, I've prepared a special one for you~
* But... I think you would regret hearing it.
* Our motto is "Your satisfaction comes first, but your gold comes close~"
* I suppose that now, that applies to you as well~

name: shop.muffet.talk_apologize
children: * Oh, are you still worried about that? Let bygones be bygones, dearie~
* But if you really want to be even, hm, let's see...~
* Scaring everyone back over to this side could help a lot.
* But if you really want to be even, spread the word of our upcoming reopening~
* There's no better endorsement than from a human who likes spiders~
* Fine, fine, I get it!
* I... think I get it.
* Besides, if anything happened to you now, it'd draw ire from... certain sponsors~
* So, consider this one thing forgiven...
* Your other debts, on the other hands... your gold-lined pockets can do the talking~
* For what, may I ask?
* For ruining my one chance to sell anywhere but here?
* Oh! In that case, you'll gladly donate your flesh to my cause, yes?
* If you're so ABSOLUTELY GUILTY?
* You...
* Do you even know why you're apologizing, human?
* Hss... Nevermind...
* I know why.

name: shop.muffet.talk_date
children: * Hm?
* ... Actually.
* You were expecting me to say "For what" again, right?
* You blurt out all these niceties and then get people to wonder what are they for...
* It's... not a bad trick.
* I just might use it to confuse you one day~
* My, how very bold of you, dearie.
* Oh, well. It's your fate! * Ahuhuhu~
* ... So we have that much in common?
* Very well, I guess you can waltz all over my affairs after all...
* ... Not~ * Does that act really work where you're from, human?
* ... Wait... * What kind of pastries do humans make anyway...?
* Oh, the heck with it~ If you're so desperate, let's have you bake something~
* But if you start a fire, you're getting locked in the room with it...
* Are you up to the task? I wonder, I wonder~
* Take a wild guess...
* You're the only one here, so I think that speaks volumes enough.
* It's just a temporary setback, of course~ I'm not one to just... slowly die~
* I'm now in charge of this business~ The entire thing is under my control~
* So, that makes me the only one left who can save it, doesn't it~ You can't, they can't...
* They... would sooner see me working the counter at Grillby's.
* They would want nothing else but the fastest imaginable death granted on me~
* If you're not one of them... don't let me rely on anything but your gold.

name: shop.muffet.talk_donate
children: * Don't think about it too hard, it's a simple exchange system~
* Donate gold to me, and you'll get our rarest pastries for your trouble...
* ... While I use the funds to refurbish the bakery into something more presentable~ Win-win~
* Clean up the cobwebs? You wish~
* Naturally, your donations will be put to good use~
* For starters, we're thinking of renovating the place a little...
* Like a grand reopening of sorts~ It's a surefire way to draw new customers in~
* Normally, they're so boring, refusing to even set a foot in~ But, after this...
* By the time they realize they're in the Spider Bakery, it'll be too late~
* As part of our charity incentives, we've set up mouth-watering prizes~
* For donating a certain amount of gold to our cause, you'll access new tiers~
* Each tier reached means a delicious treat from our "scrapped food menu..."
* They had us take it off due to health concerns, but I have to get rid of inventory somehow~
* It's like a collector's item for every notable donation you make~ Isn't that cool!
* ... The skeleton told us to say that.

name: sign.ruined10
children: * "Remember to treasure those closest to you."
* "Especially those you see yourself reflected in."
* "In the end, you will keep each other on the right path."
* "Note: the red switch resets the puzzle."

name: sign.ruined11_1
children: * This plaque is semi-obscured by some vines. * I can read the other half...
* "...control bridge..."
* "...cross chasm..."
* "...start... bottom left..."
* "...end... bottom right..."
* "...diagonal order..."
* That's not very helpful...

name: sign.ruined11_2
children: * "Use this switch to reset the puzzle."

name: sign.ruined12
children: * "Some solutions are very straightforward, and require but a push forward."

name: sign.ruined13
children: * "From left to right..."
* "In order to avoid being last in life, you must first consider your options."
* "There are many paths available to you."
* "If your initial idea doesn't work out, consider secondary options."
* "If that doesn't work, then the third time's the charm!"

name: sign.ruined14_1
children: * "Long ago, a legendary pirate sailed the Starlight Isles."
* "They say he buried his treasure to the west, on fertile green islands..."
* "With a trail of clues leading from the top, to bottom, and finally to the southeast."
* "Only by following them, one by one, can their secrets be unlocked."

name: sign.ruined14_2
children: * "Yar har har! Ye'll never find me precious treasure!"
* "While it's true those clues point the way..."
* "They be only HALF the puzzle!"
* "Out abroad these oceans blue, at the opposite end of the earth..."
* "Ye'd be flipped around and about trying to find yer way!"
* "- The Pirate"

name: sign.ruined15
children: * It's an ancient monolith, inscribed with mystical runes.
* ... Which has advertisements plastered all over it.
* "Witness an experience of drama, action, romance..."
* "A performance to rock your world and steal your heart..."
* "For the very low price of 600G!" * "- MTT Productions"

name: sign.ruined16
children: * "This area has been decreed the Human Capture Bridge."
* "Humans, beware!"
* "Not even to slow down in FIGHTs will save you...!"
* "- The Ruined Knights"

name: sign.ruined16B
children: * "This plaque certifies the puzzle gauntlet as 100% anti-human!"
* "Not a singnle one should be able to breach these defenses."
* It seems they spelled "single" wrong.

name: sign.ruined17_1
children: * "You're almost there!" * "Stay determined!"

name: sign.ruined17_2
children: * "Never fret, for the leaves shall catch your fall."

name: sign.ruined18
children: * "You mustn't order the rocks around!"
* "They already have been, after all..."

name: sign.ruined19
children: * "Long ago, a little monster came across a valley of flowers."
* "First, it smelled the roses in the middle."
* "Second, it admired the violets."
* "And third, it took a clover for good luck."

name: sign.ruined19_2
children: * "Use this switch to reset the puzzle."

name: sign.ruined20
children: * "Three contestants, top to bottom, enter a race."
* "Try as they might to win, however..."
* "... only one can make it to first place."
* "Note: the switch resets the puzzle."

name: sign.ruined21
children: * "One, two, three, four..."
* "So many choices, yet so little..."
* "Before you make a lasting decision, however..."
* "Consider the one which precedes it."
* "Note: the switch resets the puzzle."

name: sign.ruined22
children: * "While the body exists in one realm, the spirit dwells in another."
* "But together, both make the same world."
* "A change in one shall affect the other."

name: sign.ruined23_1
children: * "Congratulations on completing the puzzle gauntlet!"
* "As a reward for accomplishing this challenge, you may have a piece of candy!"
"- ASGORE"
* There's a piece of candy taped to the back of the sign.
* I take it off the sign, but the tape is still stuck to the candy.
* I decide to put it in my pocket anyway.
* ... I don't have room for it.

name: sign.ruined23_2
children: * "Have you forgotten something behind?"
* "If so, use this door to return to the start."

name: sign.ruined2_1
children: * "A treacherous world lies ahead, where truth is blinded by dishonesty."
* "Only by using your wits can you open your eyes."

name: sign.ruined2_2
children: * "I always speak the truth."
* "In order to proceed, you must press me last."
* "Be cautious, as the rightmost switch is a liar."

name: sign.ruined2_3
children: * "I am a liar."
* "In order to proceed, you must press me second."
* "You must also press the right switch last."
* "Be cautious, as both the left and right switches are liars."

name: sign.ruined2_4
children: * "I always speak the truth."
* "In order to proceed, you must press me first."
* "Be cautious, as the middle switch is a liar."

name: sign.ruined3
children: * "Life is not always as simple as following instructions."

name: star.crossbones_intro
children: * So. You're the human I've heard so much about.
* You know...
* A lot of people were excited for the next human to fall.
* Whether they were excited to be free...
* To see something rare and new...
* Or even to meet a new potential friend.
* But judging by your expression, and that dust on your clothes...
* You're not here to make friends.
* But that's just fine. * I'm not here to be your friend, either.
* I'm here to make you answer for yourself.
* So get ready, kid...
* cause you're in for a bad time.
* You know...
* This is all pretty surprising.
* After everything I've heard about you...
* I didn't really think you'd turn around just like that.
* Really makes a guy wonder what your motivations for everything were.
* But at the end of the day... does that even matter?
* Because either way...
* you're the bad-
* uh.
* guy.
* cause, believe it or not...
* hold on.
OH, COME ON! SERIOUSLY?!
HOW THE HECK DID YOU FORGET THOSE LINES?!
YOU SAID THEY WERE YOUR FAVORITE PART!
* i dunno, i just uh...
* got distracted, i guess?
DISTRACTED???
THIS SPEECH WAS GOING TO WIN YOU AWARDS!
AND MAYBE A SPEECH AT THE AWARD CEREMONY!
WHICH WOULD WIN US EVEN MORE AWARDS!
WHAT COULD BE MORE IMPORTANT THAN THIS?!
AND DON'T GIVE ME THAT OLD "HUMAN" EXCUSE!
* it's a pretty good excuse to have, you gotta admit.
I DO, AND THAT'S WHY I DON'T WANNA HEAR IT!
* but yeah, you're right. that was silly of me.
* i'll do a better job at staying focused from now on.
* oh hey, shiny light.
WE'RE NOT DONE YET! THE AWARDS!
* (He throws something on the ground...)
THE LOVELY AWARDS!!
THE LOVELY AWARDS!!
* you're the bad guy.
* cause, believe it or not, your existence is a crime.
* as crossbones, the hero and protector of the starlight isles...
* i can't let criminals slip by my watch.
* so, throughout these woods, you will be judged.
* you will be judged for your every action.
* everything you do, everything you don't do...
* and, in the end, we'll duel.
* there, your history will come to light. * and...
* ... nah, i got nothing.
NOTHING??? YOU CAN'T JUST SAY -NOTHING!!!-
ARE YOU SERIOUS???
WE PRACTICED FOR WEEKS. WEEKS!!!
* the circumstances have changed quite a bit, papyrus.
* i get where you're coming from here. i really do.
* but... don't you think we could save this for later?
... GOOD POINT. I'LL LET YOU SLIDE FOR NOW.
BUT ONLY FOR NOW!!!
* heh, i'm sure.
* come on, we gotta make sure things are going smoothly.
RIGHT BEHIND YOU!!
* well, for now, i'll just throw you a bone.
NO NO NO!!!
WE PREPARED FOR THIS!!!
WE PRACTICED FOR TWO WEEKS STRAIGHT!
"THROW YOU A BONE?" REALLY??
* the job is a bit different than expected sometimes, papyrus.
* do you really expect the hero to remember their entire speech?

HOW ELSE ARE YOU 
SUPPOSED TO 
INSPIRE THE PUBLIC...
... WITHOUT A REALLY COOL, LONG SPEECH!?
YOU NEED TO BE PREPARED! PRECISE!
YOU CAN'T JUST... AD-LIB EVERYTHING!!
* wouldn't it be more genuine...
* if it's said in the moment, and not rehearsed...?
... WELL, YES, BUT--
* huh, would ya look at that.
* welp, duty calls.
OH NO YOU DON'T, MISTER!
UGH. CAN YOU BELIEVE THIS IS MY -BROTHER?-
UNBELIEVABLE!
OH! YOU'RE!! THE HUMAN!!
MY FRIEND LET ME KNOW YOU WERE COMING!

YOU MIGHT HAVE 
MET HIM.
... WHAT'S WRONG? DID SOMETHING HAPPEN?

ANYWAYS, HE 
CALLED ME A LITTLE WHILE AGO.

I DIDN'T THINK YOU'D 
REACH STARLIGHT 
ISLES SO SOON!!

AND WHAT EXCELLENT 
TIMING, TOO! 
FOR YOU SEE...
HE SAID YOU LEFT THESE BEHIND!
YOU MIGHT GET LOST WITH YOUR NEWFOUND SPEED...

BUT, NO MATTER! 
FOR I, THE GREAT PAPYRUS...
... WILL DO MY BEST TO GUIDE YOU!
NYEH HEH HEH!!!

BUT, NO MATTER! 
FOR I, THE GREAT PAPYRUS...
... WILL DO MY BEST TO GUIDE YOU!
NYEH HEH HEH!!!

ANYWAYS, HE

I DIDN'T THINK YOU'D 
REACH STARLIGHT 
ISLES SO SOON!!

"ILLUMINATE YOUR

DOINGS?" REALLY??

... WITHOUT A REALLY COOL, LONG SPEECH!?

YOU CAN'T JUST... AD-LIB EVERYTHING!!

* Heh...
* As much as I'd like to shake your hand...
* ... I can't get all chummy with you.
* I lurk in the shadows, ready to bring justice to evil-doers.
* Anyone who threatens the peace.
* Anyone who threatens monsterkind.
* And now that you're here?
* Well, let's just say...

name: star.dogcheck_faunnpc
children: * Do humans even have festivals?
* Oh, sorry. It's just weird to imagine humans having fun sometimes.
* Man, they're really tightening up security for this year's festival.

* Man, they're really tightening up security for this year's festival.
* One of the Navy Scouts I passed seemed kinda out of it, though.
* Er, are we sure the festival's in good hands...?
* Man, they're really tightening up security for this year's festival.

name: star.mountain
children: * (Gazing out from the top of this mountain, at the crystals and scenery below...)
* (It's bewildering to imagine something so large, underneath a mountain.)
* (The sparkling crystals on the cavern ceiling, like twinkling stars in the night sky...)
* (... It reminds me of something.)
* (In my mind, a vague recollection begins to take form.)
* (It's... a memory.)
* (Lying atop golden flowers, watching the night sky...)
* (It was the only location of peace.)
* (Almost as if... somewhere out there...)
* (I... belonged.)
* (But there's something else.)
* (As my mind tries to dig further, to recall more...)
* (This feeling of escape, of comfort... it turns to fear.)
* (What was the reason I climbed this mountain in the first place?)
* (Not this one, but the one above. Monsterkind's stone prison.)
* (I climbed it because I wanted to...)
* (I wanted to...)
* (A MEMORY has been regained.)
* (A MEMORY has been regained.)

name: star.mountain_2
children: * ... So! What a view, Servant!
* Standing high above the pitiful do-gooders below...
* One day, it'll all be OURS for the taking!

name: star.mountain_3
children: * ... Servant?
* Are... are you okay?
* You seemed lost in thought, back there.
* It seemed comforting at first, but then.
* Like it also... hurt.
* And, well, I...
* I just... wanted to see if everything was alright.
* ... Y-you know! Because of, er, the festival!
* You see, I can't have my Servant's mind wandering adrift...
* ... When there's EVIL to be done!

name: star.mountain_4
children: * ... But really, if...
* If there's anything wrong, just let me know, okay?

name: star.mountain_flowey
children: * Looks like a nice view today.
* As it probably is every day.
* The stars always seem to align the way you want them to.
* You know what sets you apart from this view?
* You change. It doesn't.
* But, the more of it you'll see...
* I've been down this road, my friend!
* You stare at a memory for too long...
* ... It'll become synonymous with the choices you've made now.
* I just... don't want you to mistake all this for comfort.
* It's not.
* You're letting bad memories seep in, and...
* This mountain will change more than you will.

name: star.mountain_flowey_2
children: * I still don't get it.
* Just trying to do what you were doing.
* I'll catch up later.

name: star.pianopush
children: * L-LARRY, IT'S BACK!
* WHY WON'T THIS THING MOVE?!
* C'mon, see! The boss said we gotta get this piano moved, pronto!
* You think I ain't pushin'? I'm trying my hardest, here!
* Well try harder, see! Put ya back into it, or somethin'.
* Why don't you just huff n' puff and SHUT UP!!
* Sooner you stop blabbing, the sooner I can moves it.

name: star.pianopush_2
children: * Huh...? Who's sneakin' around!?
* L-L-L-L-L-L-LARRY!!!
* Aw, what is it NOW?
* L-LARRY, IT'S THE H-H-H-H-H-H-
* The huh? * What are you talkin' about, the h...
* T-THE H-H-H-H-H-H-
* THE HUMAN!!!
* LARRY, QUICK, PUSH THE PIANO!

name: star.pianopush_3
children: * LARRY, IT'S GETTING CLOSER!!
* I'M TRYIN', HARRY!

name: star.pianopush_4
children: * LARRY, PLEASE!!! IT'S GETTING CLOSER!!
* I'M TRYIN' HARRY, I'M TRYIN'!!

name: star.pianopush_5
children: * LARRY, PLEASE--
* H-HEY! WAIT UP!!
* F-FINE, I'LL DO IT!

name: star.raft_daughter
children: * (Between you and me, he gets kinda lonely, sometimes.)
* (Dredging around for treasure brings in some good money, bless Mr. Boom's heart...)
* (But I think... he misses his friends.)
* (He used to ride out on the waters with them a lot, he tells me.)
* (So, if you could just ride along with him, even just once, I think...)
* (I think it'd make him really happy.)
* Talk to pops for a ride.
* If you're looking for a ride, talk to pops.

name: star.raft_fisherman
children: * Huh? Whuzzat? * ... Oh, just one of them festival-goers!
* You don't look like you're from here...
* I'll say! * Y'come all the way here for the festival, kiddo?

* Say, kiddo! * Howsabout a bona fide boat ride?
* Getcha just about anywhere you wanna go, yes siree!
* You up for it?
Yes
No
* Hot dog! You won't regret it!
* Climb aboard, kiddo!
* Hmm...
* ... Need the map, again?
* Nah, my memory ain't that bad!
* Just thinkin' about the, ah, optimal route, s'all.
* Start 'er up, darlin'!
* Sure thing, pops.
* S'pose we should introduce ourselves, shouldn't we?
* The name's Herschel! This here's my daughter, Polly.
* Hi.
* The two of us have got a mighty fine profession!
* We collect garbage.
* Y'see, humans are always throwing out so much junk!
* It'll usually wash down from the surface, and collect over in Crystal Springs.
* Other times, the water currents pull it over here.
* Don't want trash mucking up the waters, so we go fish it out!
* Then we take it to Mr. Boom's shop, get it appraised right, and let'im auction it.
* Come a few days later, we make a mighty fine profit!
* It's alright.
* Er, I likes to think it's more than alright...
* Oh! Theeeere's our stop!
* Yee-haw! What a ride!
* Come again... or don't.
* Yee-haw! What a ride!
* Come again... or don't.

name: star.rm11_pap
children: FROM HERE, JUST KEEP HEADING FORWARD.

GO STRAIGHT TO THE 
VILLAGE, AND FOLLOW 
THE NAVY SOLDIERS.
DON'T WORRY ABOUT THE HUMAN, EITHER. THE SCOUTS ARE...
... HANDLING... IT...?
HELLO! WE HAVEN'T MET JUST YET, BUT...
I'D LIKE TO HAVE A QUICK TALK.
... I KNOW YOU'RE HURTING PEOPLE.
IN RUINED HOME, AND IN STARLIGHT ISLES.
I DON'T KNOW WHY YOU'RE DOING THIS, BUT...
I BELIEVE YOU CAN DO BETTER! YOU CAN BE BETTER!
YOU DON'T HAVE TO HURT PEOPLE, YOU KNOW!
YOU CAN ALWAYS JUST...
SETTLE DOWN, AND HAVE FUN FOR A WHILE.

name: stark.dining_stache
children: * Though, to be honest... * Something has troubled me.

* I don't recall his name from the historical records.
* Perhaps he's a long-lost descendant...?
* Ah, Koffin Keep. * I recall how old and decrepit this castle used to be!

* ... And for an oddly-specific list of monsters to reside here.

name: stark.dining_table
children: * Ah, takes me back to my initial suit...
* "The wider you are, the higher the bar" was my creed!

* A big dining table is second only to a throne!
* Wait, now that I think about it. Do I even have a throne?
* Not that I'd need one, floating's a much comfier alternative...
* Why did I buy a table?!
* (A comically-large table, with comically-little usage, it seems.)

name: stark.dining_window
children: * (At Koffin-K's command, I dramatically shook my fist at the window.)
* (The gardener outside is staring at me with a baffled expression.)
* I'll get you this time, Crossbones! Until the getting is done!
* ... Don't look at me like that. Clearly, I'm practicing my lines.
* Even were I to lose, I have to lose with flair, don't I?
* Now raise your fist and shake it with vengeance!
* Then again, perhaps it would be better suited for sneering defeatedly out of.
* "I'll get you next time, Crossbones! Next time..."
* The perfect window to stare out of while plotting your next moves.

* HAHAHA! Nearly spooked your soul out of your body, eh?
* Not to fret, this chest had its explosive functions set offline.

* But with my shining suit, what do I have to be guilty of? Mwahah!
* Why did the.
* Why did the detector go off.
* Oh no.
* (And so he's only been fed six times today.)
* (And so he left the donut in the study.)
* (And so he forgot to put it on.)
* HE'S ONLY BEEN FED SIX TIMES TODAY!!
* I LEFT THE DONUT IN THE STUDY!!
* I FORGOT TO PUT IT ON!!
* My cute pet fish...?
* My craving for donuts...?
* My shining suit...?
* Hold it! Haven't you read the note?
* This chest went BOOM! * So we can't acknowledge its existence anymore.
* (I opened the chest.) * (Inside is a note...)
* "BOOM!!!"
* Ha! Were this an actual bomb, you'd be naught but charcoal by now!
* That said, my batvisors strongly batvised me to not do that anymore.
* Rebuilding half the castle everytime someone opened that chest, it...
* Suffice to say, it was only worth it the first couple times.
* (I open the chest...)
* (There's a note inside...)
* "Mwahahaha! Fooled by my distraction of finest caliber!"

Feed Jeremy
Clean Suit
Bring Donut
Nevermind
* What are you waiting for?
* Hm? You've already found something to feed him with.
* Jeremy should still be in the west side of the castle.
* Hopefully.
* He's already been fed.
* And may we all rest easy.
* You've fed Jeremy? See, I knew you could do it!
* Hey, he didn't by any chance turn into some type of, uh...
* ... giant... monster thing.
* Right?
* What? No, I'm just curious! It's simple curiosity!!
* We're talking about Jeremy again? I wouldn't, personally.
* It's a secret.
* Well, I guess that takes care of that!
* Funny, though. Were you asked to give him specifically ROCK candy?
* Or were you just improvising?
* Oh, no, don't worry. I'm not about to tattletale on you.
* I know for sure that if I was presented with a problem...
* ... I'd discard the obvious solution and find a thousand others.
* As for the solution you've found...
* ... I'll keep it our little secret.
* You know.
* Hm, how'd that one go again...?
* Something about candy in a locked room, I think.
* But at this point, I think you'd know more than silly ol' me.
* Look for a locked room.
* Look for a locked room.
* I'll repeat this as many times as it takes.
* The candy has to be in one of the locked rooms.
* I mean, you wouldn't let just anybody take your candy, right?
* Finding candy in an evil castle sounds like a toughie.
* But even here, somebody's gotta have a sweet tooth.
* My guess is, they've got it all locked up.
* Jeremy? That fish from the westside aquarium?
* Yeah, that's... gonna be a problem.
* I took one peek in that room, and...
* Jeremy looked at me funny.
* I don't look like candy, okay?!
* He'd mistake a rock for candy if it was given to him!
* But, uh, you probably shouldn't do that.
* Health hazards and all that. Better to find actual candy.
* Howdy! It's been a while.
* You sure have a knack for getting yourself into trouble, huh?
* I guess it makes for a more exciting day at the end of it, but...
* You really oughta be a little more careful, y'know?
* Nice getup, by the way.
* So, you're actually going to fulfill bat brain's demands?
* Well, it just so happens that yours truly...
* ... knows this place through and through!
* It's a big castle out there. If you ever need a hint...
* Just give your new pal Flowey a holler!
* Howdy! It's been a while.
* Relatively speaking, I mean.
* How long has it been for you?
* Ah, forget it. We gotta focus on getting you outta here, right?
* I'll be here if you need my help!
* Well?
* Don't you have something to ask?
Feed Jeremy
Clean Suit
Bring Donut
Nevermind

* What a fun waste of your time this was.

* Are these adventures with Koffin-K really worth it?

He's So
Worth It

We'll
See

children: * Get a move on, Servant!

* I'm limiting myself to look at this statue only once every 60 moons.

* At first, it portrayed me with a buttoned up shirt, and jeans...
* I had to step in and say "YOU FOOLS! Do I look like I'm wearing jeans?"
* My art team promptly came up with this in response.
* I'm still livid about it, but I can't deny it is scarily well made.
* (Let's move on.)
* (He better not ask me to clean this.)
* (It's horrible.)
* (I don't want to look at this anymore.)
