* Welcome to da Spooky Servant's Station! (We builts it ourselves...!)
* Some fine craftsmanships we got, eh, roomie?
* Da boss told us to fill some extra stuff out for ya, see... So we did!
* All ya duties' in that JOURNAL, see!
* Ya just... do the duties!! * Get da duties done!
* Yeah, lots and lots of DUTIES. Huhuhuhuh!
* Anyhoo, see...
* ... while YOU'RE out workin', doin' all that hard stuff...
* ... We're gonna be GOOFING OFF!!!
* SUCKER!!! LET'S BEAT IT, LARRY!!!
* (My ITEMs are gone.)

* (Slacking isn't on my task list.)

name: stark.shed.kk_bed_interact
children: * No time to rest, Servant!
* Besides, I refuse to be used as a cushion.
* But really. There's no rest for the wicked.

* Rebelling not just against our parents...
* BUT AGAINST THE VERY CIRCLE OF LIFE THAT DEMANDS SLEEP FROM US.
* ... I really need some sleep.
* Servant, no! Get away from that bed!
* Don't you know the repercussions?
* They say, if you lay on a bed for an extended period of time...
* You might become... UNCONSCIOUS.
* How EVIL is THAT? And who knows when you'll wake up again!

name: stark.shed.laugh
children: * Clearly, this sign was made for only one person. Me!

* Ah! This sign says it all. The three essentials of life!
* Then again, isn't laughing moreso MY thing?
* Hm, yes... surely this should be hung up in my quarters, not here.
* I'll have someone replace this later...
* ... with a "Quiver! Whimper! Despair!" sign!
* (I feel more inspired by the minute... I think.)
* (It's some kind of inspirational sign.)
* "Laugh!" * "Laugh!" * "Laugh!"

I...

name: stars.beach_boogiemen

name: stars.beach_doggo

ARF WOOF

name: stars.beach_dogi
children:
Instructions from Miss Dohj? 
 (Can't she do her own hole digging? We're b-u-s-y...)
Wait, honey, this could be about the old Commander!
(Oh! Oh-oh-oh, well that changes things!)
(The Commander's always been so nice to us!)
Please, tell us what we can do for him!

BOW-WAN!
WAN-WOW!
WAN-WAN! BOW-WOW!

BOW-WOW!
WAN-WAN!
Hold on...

She really said that? Weird... 
 (I'm telling you, we should add our own flourishes...)

The Commander used to play with us all the time. 
 (He let me bite his tail once!)

(We have each other, but we still love company.) 
 The Commander understood that.

We don't see him these days... 
 (When's he going to play with us again...?)
Crossbones might be an annoyance to us Navy scouts...
(But he does inspire a lot of hope in monsters here.)
That, and he deals with all of Koffin-K's nonsense.
(That way, we don't need to.)
The day Sans showed up, he acted like he already knew everyone.
(Nobody thought too much about it.)
And even though he used to keep more to himself...
(He's been a little more involved with things around here.)
Ever since our Grillby's closed, we thought we wouldn't see Sans around here.
(But to our surprise, he's been all around the place.)
The only time we'd ever see him was at the counter.
(Maybe the closure changed something with him?)
We felt so bad about it once we realized...
(But thankfully, he turned up just fine.)
Wait, a moment. That smell...
(Did you have something to do with it?)
We figured out what we were forgetting earlier.
(Greater Dog never showed up for festival preparations.)
The Admiral tasked all of us to look for him, but...
(... We got too caught up in each other while searching.)
We already felt bad enough after realizing we forgot to look for Greater Dog.
(But now, Lesser Dog is nowhere to be seen...)
We might have to call another search soon.
We've been waiting for Lesser Dog to show up.
(At first, we thought he was running late looking for Greater Dog.)
But even Greater Dog hasn't seen him.
Wait a moment. That smell...
(Have you seen our friend anywhere?)
We felt so bad once we realized...
(But he's bound to be around somewhere.)
We figured out what we were forgetting earlier.
(Greater Dog never showed up for festival preparations.)
The Admiral tasked all of us to look for him, but...
(... We got too caught up in each other while searching.)
This isn't the first time Doggo's gotten lost.
(He can only see moving things. Letting him pilot a submarine...)
Well, it was his idea to begin with.
(But someone else approved it.)
Where's Doggo? He should have been here.
(Do you think he got lost again?)
I guess we'll find out when someone spots his submarine.
(Whose bright idea was it to give him that, anyways?)
Do you think they're pulling some kind of prank?
(It wouldn't be the first time.)
I don't like the smell of this.
(Our friends haven't shown up when they were supposed to.)
Who else are we supposed to play with?

* "Without magic, our bodies dissipate, and the SOUL becomes too fragile to survive."
* "A human's SOUL, on the other hand, was proven to live on without the help of its body."

* "Arguably, it's possible it'd work the other way around too." 
* "A living body without a SOUL."
* "It may explain why cremation is the popular method of burial in the human world."
* "It follows similar principles to our funeral rites, and..."
* "It may be the only way to be absolutely sure."

name: stars.library_olddog
children: * (I shouldn't be talking from behind...)
* I'll be waiting here... * M-Maybe the parade will do a repeat performance?
* If not, oh well. Please be sure to thank the organizer for me, it was very nice.
* I-I'm not seeing things? * A real human...?
* It's very nice to meet you... * The name's Freddo. Current Commander of the Royal Navy.
* I wish we could have more time to chat, but if someone sees you right now...
* K-Kid, trust me, it's better you stay out of sight.
* No, see- just listen. * Listen to that crowd...

Come
With Me
* It was just yesterday that these roads were completely empty.
* Frighteningly empty... I knew that wouldn't last. I knew something was about to happen.
* Now these roads are filled with more people than I've ever seen in my life.
* You see, some of them are sad because they're looking for a different way to be set free.
* But it's making those who still believe in the current plan very upset.
* Now they're about to fight each other over it, and, it's just...
* I must admit, it's a little scary.

Surprise
Outside
* Oh, I-If only I could just rush in there, in-between them...
* If I could make them understand, they're not only fighting for themselves.
* Our future generations will look back on this, on how we got them this far.
* And what will they think if they find out that this is how we secured their future...?
* The very thing we despised - war - normalized as a solution to all.
* Until war becomes all we've been, and will ever be known for.

* I-I must stop this fighting... 
* To prevent that image of us, before it's too late.
* Yet, what's stopping me? Why do my legs refuse to run?
* Will I ever make it in time...?

I Will
Tell Them

It'll Be
Okay, Sir
* Ah... it's too dangerous for you to put yourself in that crossfire.
* And y'know, I'm not saying that because I don't believe you're capable of such a risk.
* Sometimes, it's just better to send the one who's already seen all that life has to offer.
* But thank you. You'd make a great Navy Scout.
* Hm?
* That sound... is someone playing music?
* I must go see.
* Why, that was such a lovely performance...
* It warms my heart to see the Navy give it their all to honor...
* ... To honor the continued traditions of the Guiding Light festival.
* I remember parades like this, dating back to the very first festival.
* In fact, our first parade was just terrible.
* I should know, I was part of it, hohoho. They had me on juggling duty.
* Had absolutely no idea what I was doing, but gosh, did I try.
* I must say, I've definitely set a record for the most broken windows that day, hohoho!
* Ah, but no matter what kind of parade it was, you look back on it and you think of one thing.
* It was a peaceful time, created by peace-loving people.
* Everyone was so kind, so ready to help each other.
* To be able to see one more parade, in my current age...
* In my... current...
* There is no war, is there...?
* No, there couldn't be. Not if we're still smiling and having fun.
* I can see that we haven't found our way out of the Underground yet.
* And still, everyone is doing their best to cheer each other up.
* Even if asking for our freedom is too much, I'm just happy for that one single comfort.
* Even 30 years later... * They still remember that day.
* The parade was hosted by the Navy Scouts, right? I recognized those uniforms.
* Please, whenever you're able to, send them my best wishes.
* They'll do just fine without their ex-commander, hohoho.
* I must say, some of them did feel a little "forced," after so many years of doing them.
* Me and my friends, we had a kind of sixth sense about these things.
* If a parade looked half-baked, we would leave and spend our time in the booths instead.
* Oh dear, you should see how I was with the strength tests!
* It got me to be quite popular back then, hohoho.
* In fact, our first parade was just terrible.
* I should know, I was part of it, hohoho. They had me on juggling duty.
* Had absolutely no idea what I was doing, but gosh, did I try.
* I must say, I've definitely set a record for the most broken windows that day, hohoho!
* Parades that were just like this... so full of passion, so joyful in their execution.
* It was magic without the magic, if you know what I mean, hoho.
* I would sit there in the grass with my friends, and we'd all just watch silently.
* No words spoken... no words needed. It was truly breath-taking.
* Why, that was such a lovely performance...
* It warms my heart to see the Navy give it their all to honor...
* ... To honor the continued traditions of the Guiding Light festival.
* I remember parades like this, dating back to the very first festival.
* (This old dog seems lost in thought...)
* (Perhaps there's someone I can talk to about this?)
* (This old dog seems lost in thought...)
* (I shouldn't bother him.)

name: stars.library_scarflady
children:
* If you've been wondering why there's bingo here, Crossbones. 
* Crossbones is why.
* My coverage of the story should be somewhere in the archives, if you're curious...
* And it all took place here, so I didn't have to get out of my chair to write these!
* I'm working on a new Cross- Oops! A new Undying Robotics headline!
* We've been doing so many Crossbones reports lately, his name's swimming in my head.

name: stars.pap_bedside_table
children: I JUST THINK HE'S NEAT!
SORRY ABOUT THE PILE OF NOTES.

YOU SEE, I TRIED 
SLEEPING LAST NIGHT. 
IT'S BEEN A WHILE!

HOWEVER, EVERY 
TIME I GOT CLOSE...
... MY MIND... WANDERED.
AND SO I WOKE UP 50 TIMES...
... ALL OF WHICH TO WRITE DOWN CROSSBONES IDEAS.
WANT TO KNOW WHAT'S *TRULY* INSPIRING?
ACTION FIGURES.

THE WAY THEY 
BATTLE, THEIR 
ETERNAL STRUGGLE...
IT MADE ME WANT TO CREATE MY OWN!!
(THE REST ARE UNDER THE TABLE.)

name: stars.pap_room_bed
children: ARE YOU ALSO LOOKING FOR INSPIRATION?
ONE HUMAN'S TRASH IS ANOTHER SKELETON'S PRIDE!
NOT THE BED. THE FLAG.
UNDYNE LOVED THE IDEA AND SAID I'D BE PERFECT FOR IT!
UNFORTUNATELY, I WAS TOO... BUSY, AT THE TIME.
SO NATURALLY, SANS TOOK THE ROLE.
IT ENDED UP WORKING OUT QUITE NICELY!!
MOSTLY.
OH, THE FLAG?
UNDYNE AND I FOUND IT WASHED UP AT THE BEACH.
WE TOOK IT TO MR. BOOM, WHO PATCHED IT UP FOR US!

AND WHILE I HAVE 
MY OWN THEORIES 
ABOUT ITS ORIGIN...
LOOKING AT IT GAVE ME... INSPIRATION.
"WHAT IF THERE WAS A SUPERHERO..."
"WITH THAT AS THE LOGO!?"
INQUIRING ABOUT MY "HOT ROD," ARE YOU?

WELL, THAT'S MY 
BED! IT CAN'T 
ACTUALLY DRIVE YET.
SOMETIMES, I DREAM ABOUT DRIVING DOWN A LONE HIGHWAY.
THE SUN SETTING... WIND BLOWING THROUGH MY HAIR...
A "CRUISE WHILE I SNOOZE," IF YOU WILL.

THOUGH, LATELY, 
I'VE HAD A DIFFERENT 
KIND OF DREAM.
WHAT IF THE CROSSMOBILE...
WAS ALSO A "HOT ROD!?"
"THE HOT MOBILE..."

SIGH... I GUESS YOU CAN LOOK AROUND.
JUST *DON'T* LOOK AT MY COMPUTER!

name: stars.pap_room_weirdtalk
children: HEY, YOU!
BEFORE YOU LEAVE, I NEED TO ASK YOU SOMETHING.
SO... HUMAN. HAVE YOU SEEN ANYTHING...
... WEIRD, LATELY?

Define
"Weird"

When
haven't I?
WELL, SOMETHING OUT OF THE USUAL.
SOMETHING LIKE... STRANGE WHISPERS AND VOICES.
MOVEMENT IN THE CORNER OF YOUR EYE.
AND... THE FEELING YOU'RE BEING WATCHED.
HAVE YOU NOTICED ANYTHING?
I have
I haven't
... OH, NO.
IF THAT'S THE CASE, THEN...
YOU'RE IN GRAVE DANGER, HUMAN.
AN UNDERCOVER MASTERMIND HAS YOU IN ITS SIGHTS.
ONE WHICH SLINKS IN THE DARKNESS...

FEIGNING AN IGNORANT 
FACADE AS IT PULLS 
THE STRINGS OF FATE.
YOU MUST BE CAREFUL MOVING FORWARD.
BECAUSE NOW, I FINALLY KNOW THAT...
SANS IS PRANKING *BOTH* OF US!!!!!
I THOUGHT IT WAS JUST ME. BUT NO!

IT WASN'T ENOUGH TO 
HAVE *ONE* VICTIM 
OF HIGH JINKS...
AND SURE, HE'S DENIED IT!!

BUT I *WILL* FIND 
WHERE HE HIDES MY 
MISSING BELONGINGS.
AND I *WILL* CATCH HIM DOING IT!!!
... HE WAS RIGHT OUTSIDE.

name: stars.stands_minigolf_intro
children:
It's easy-breezy. Just stop the arrow as close to the center 
as you can, then... HOLE-IN-ONE!
Oh, did I mention there's prizes? Right, right, I'll let you play now...

name: stars.stands_minigolf_outro
children: It's a one! It's a one! It's a Hole! In! One!
Fantastic! Confirmed hole-in-one!
It is my honor to award such a wonderful golfer an equally wonderful reward.
I'm offering only one prize a player, but you're welcome to keep trying, just for fun.
I'll never stop believing in you.
Don't give up. If nobody else will, I'll still believe in you.
(Can we believe less in golfing, and more in me stealing your stuff?)
I'm sorry... the current must've been off.
But even through your most minor mistakes, you should fight them with a smile.

name: stars.stands_npc_caneguy
children: * On my way to play that there bingo...
* Don'tcha know, every festival gots them a bingo. 'S like the free space of festivals, hyuck.
* For a second, I was overcome with an overwhelming fear for my safety...
* It's gone now, thank goodness.
* Now I can focus on finding them there bingo tables. * Very elusive, they are!
* Hmm, maybe if I backed up a notch, I'd get a better view of them bingo tables...?
* Ah, haha, I'm jus' trying to find the nearest bingo table, is all... no need for concern.
* But bless your heart. Why, kids your age aren't usually so considerate.
* Always throwin' them buhnana peels when I least expect it...
* By me gums, could've sworn some fellas were playing 'round here... where'd they gone?
* On my way to play that there bingo...
* Don'tcha know, every festival gots them a bingo. 'S like the free space of festivals, hyuck.

* Heh, and imagine if I went to go and play bingo! This is the most purpose I've ever felt!
* I just wanted to play Bingo, not Bingo Hyper Racing 20XX...
* Everyone's so distracted by that Koffy boy, my adventures will never be spoken of...
* Yup, I've finally found a spot to play bingo, but I must say, it was quite a letdown.
* For starters, every card was 3D printed in the shape of a fancy sports car.
* The host kept talking about getting inside of it, to "roleplay the free space."
* By the time I excused myself, they started stamping the car with engine grease...

* I'm only looking to talk to two things right now.

name: tem.ruin_exit
children: * Haha... excellent work, I must say.
* Far better than I, all by myself, could manage.
* Though, this begs the question...
* Why?
* What was it that drove you to do what you've done?
* And now that you've gotten this far...
* What do you plan on doing next?
* Well, don't worry. Fortunately for us both...
* I have friends who can offer guidance.
* Yes! You let your rage flow, and cut them all down to size!
* This city's never been so quiet! It's almost kind of beautiful~!
* Whatever you wanted, you took.

* I'd probably want to take a nap after all that...
* Outstanding...
* Through sheer determination, you reduced an entire city to dust.
* Whether you wanted to or not... you've started something, human.
* And now we, the Temmies...
* ... will be here every step of the way, to help you complete it.

* In exchange for something else!

* Well, you know what?!
* I think I'll do something on my own, for once!
* D I E !
* Whew! That could've been bad.
* So... you.
* You've been causing quite a stir...
* And you haven't even left these catacombs yet.
* You've got quite the journey ahead of you, kid.
* But... maybe that's what you want?
* I'll see you up ahead.
* Is this some sort of joke to you?

* You have the power to reset. To go back...
* And this is how you use it?!
* There are so many...
* ... so many who would DIE for the chance to gain your ability.
* But you already knew that, didn't you?
* What is it you desire, really?
* What is it that you want from this world?
* Hehe... I guess, ultimately...
